Variations: Seated Barbell Military Press or Seated Cable Shoulder Press.
es: Cargue la máquina Smith con la cantidad de peso prescrita y colóquela a la altura de los hombros. Agarre la barra con un agarre por encima del ancho de los hombros. Siéntate en un banco inclinado (justo fuera de la vertical) para que la barra pueda pasar justo por delante de tu cara cuando descienda. Coloque los ganchos de seguridad en la posición correcta y levante la barra del estante de modo que sus brazos (que están completamente extendidos hacia el techo) queden expuestos al peso. Esta es tu posición inicial.
Para iniciar el movimiento, inhala y baja lentamente la barra hacia tus hombros (frente a tu cabeza). Haga una pausa por un breve momento cuando la barra toque suavemente sus hombros.
Exhala y presiona la barra hacia atrás por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press militar con barra sentado o Press de hombros con cable sentado.

name: Smith Machine Incline Bench Press
instructions: Load the machine with the desired weight and set the position of the bar so it is at chest height. Place an incline bench (around 30-45 degrees) beneath the bar and lay down on your back so the bar is directly above your chest. Adopt an overhand grip (palms facing forwards) and lift the bar off the hooks. Press the bar upwards until your arms are at full extension (slight bend at your elbows) and make sure you have set the safety bars to the correct height. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and descend the bar towards your chest by flexing at your elbows, allowing them to flare out wide. Continue to descend the bar until either your elbows are at 90 degrees or the bar gently touches your chest.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the bar back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Incline Bench Press or Incline Dumbbell Chest Press.

name.es: Press de banca inclinado con máquina Smith

To initiate the movement, inhale and descend the bar towards your chest by flexing at your elbows, allowing them to flare out wide. Continue to descend the bar until either your elbows are at 90 degrees or the bar gently touches your chest.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the bar back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Incline Bench Press or Incline Dumbbell Chest Press.
es: Cargue la máquina con el peso deseado y ajuste la posición de la barra para que quede a la altura del pecho. Coloque un banco inclinado (alrededor de 30 a 45 grados) debajo de la barra y recuéstese boca arriba de modo que la barra quede directamente sobre su pecho. Adopte un agarre por encima de la cabeza (con las palmas hacia adelante) y levante la barra de los ganchos. Presione la barra hacia arriba hasta que sus brazos estén completamente extendidos (ligeramente doblados los codos) y asegúrese de haber colocado las barras de seguridad a la altura correcta. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, inhale y descienda la barra hacia su pecho flexionando los codos, permitiendo que se abran ampliamente. Continúe descendiendo la barra hasta que sus codos estén a 90 grados o la barra toque suavemente su pecho.
Después de una breve pausa, exhala y presiona la barra hacia atrás por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press de banca inclinado con barra o Press de pecho inclinado con mancuernas.

name: Smith Machine Bent Over Rows
instructions: Load the smith machine with the desired amount of weight and allow the bar to rest as low as possible in front of you. Take hold of it with a wider than shoulder width, overhand grip by bending at your knees and waist (more so at your waist) whilst maintaining a straight back. Your arms should be hanging perpendicular to the floor at this point. This is your starting position.
Exhale and squeeze the muscles in your back to bring the bar in towards your torso. Bend at the elbow to allow the movement but try not to take any weight through your forearms/biceps.
Once the bar is as close to your body as it can be or the muscles in your back are at tight as they can be, inhale and return the barbell along the same path back into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This exercise may not be suitable for people that suffer from any back pain/injuries.
Variations: Bent Over Barbell Row or Seated Row Machine (Neutral Grip).

es: Cargue la máquina Smith con la cantidad de peso deseada y permita que la barra descanse lo más bajo posible frente a usted. Sujételo con un agarre más ancho que el ancho de los hombros, doblando las rodillas y la cintura (más aún en la cintura) mientras mantiene la espalda recta. En este punto, tus brazos deben colgar perpendiculares al suelo. Esta es tu posición inicial.
Exhala y aprieta los músculos de tu espalda para llevar la barra hacia tu torso. Doble el codo para permitir el movimiento, pero trate de no pasar ningún peso por los antebrazos o bíceps.
Una vez que la barra esté lo más cerca posible de su cuerpo o que los músculos de su espalda estén lo más tensos posible, inhale y regrese la barra por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Precaución: Este ejercicio puede no ser adecuado para personas que sufren algún dolor o lesión en la espalda.
Variaciones: Remo inclinado con barra o máquina de remo sentado (agarre neutral).

name: Smith Machine Bench Press
instructions: Load the machine with the desired weight and set the position of the bar so it is at waist height. Place a flat bench beneath the bar and lay down on your back so the bar is directly above your chest. Adopt an overhand grip (palms facing forwards) and lift the bar off the hooks. Press the bar upwards until your arms are at full extension (slight bend at your elbows) and make sure you have set the safety bars to the correct height. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and descend the bar towards your chest by flexing at your elbows, allowing them to flare out wide. Continue to descend the bar until either your elbows are at 90 degrees or the bar gently touches your chest.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the bar back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Bench Press or Dumbbell Bench Press.

es: Cargue la máquina con el peso deseado y ajuste la posición de la barra de modo que quede a la altura de la cintura. Coloque un banco plano debajo de la barra y recuéstese boca arriba de modo que la barra quede directamente encima de su pecho. Adopte un agarre por encima de la cabeza (con las palmas hacia adelante) y levante la barra de los ganchos. Presione la barra hacia arriba hasta que sus brazos estén completamente extendidos (ligeramente doblados los codos) y asegúrese de haber colocado las barras de seguridad a la altura correcta. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, inhale y descienda la barra hacia su pecho flexionando los codos, permitiendo que se abran ampliamente. Continúe descendiendo la barra hasta que sus codos estén a 90 grados o la barra toque suavemente su pecho.
Después de una breve pausa, exhala y presiona la barra hacia atrás por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press de banca con barra o Press de banca con mancuernas.

name: Seated Leg Curl
instructions: Set the machine to the desired weight and set the position of the back rest (when you sit on the machine, the back of your knees should be in contact with the edge of the seat). Next take a seat and check that when you rest your legs on the working pad, it is located just below your calves. The last guard to move is the one that gently locks your thighs in position. After you have done this, take hold of the handles in front of you and make sure your back is supported and in contact with the back rest. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale as you squeeze your heels in towards your glutes in an arcing motion by flexing your knees. Continue to do so until your hamstrings are as tight as can be or that you cannot bend your knees anymore.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the pad back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Lying Hamstring Curls or Natural Glute Ham Raise.

en: hamstrings

en: Set the machine to the desired weight and set the position of the back rest (when you sit on the machine, the back of your knees should be in contact with the edge of the seat). Next take a seat and check that when you rest your legs on the working pad, it is located just below your calves. The last guard to move is the one that gently locks your thighs in position. After you have done this, take hold of the handles in front of you and make sure your back is supported and in contact with the back rest. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale as you squeeze your heels in towards your glutes in an arcing motion by flexing your knees. Continue to do so until your hamstrings are as tight as can be or that you cannot bend your knees anymore.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the pad back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Lying Hamstring Curls or Natural Glute Ham Raise.
es: Ajuste la máquina al peso deseado y ajuste la posición del respaldo (cuando se siente en la máquina, la parte posterior de las rodillas debe estar en contacto con el borde del asiento). A continuación toma asiento y comprueba que cuando apoyes las piernas sobre la plataforma de trabajo, ésta quede justo debajo de tus gemelos. El último protector en moverse es el que bloquea suavemente los muslos en su posición. Después de haber hecho esto, agarre las manijas frente a usted y asegúrese de que su espalda esté apoyada y en contacto con el respaldo. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhale mientras aprieta los talones hacia los glúteos formando un arco flexionando las rodillas. Continúe haciéndolo hasta que los isquiosurales estén lo más tensos posible o hasta que ya no pueda doblar las rodillas.
Después de una breve pausa, inhale y regrese la almohadilla por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: rizos de isquiosurales acostados o elevación natural de glúteos.

name: Pec Deck
instructions: Take a seat on the machine, facing forwards and adjust the height of the seat so that your hips and knees are at 90 degrees. Next adjust the handles to the correct position so that they gently stretch your pectoral muscles when you take hold of them. Grip the handles and make sure that your arms are parallel to the floor at this point. This is your starting position. Tip: Keep your elbows in line with your wrists and shoulders throughout the movement and they remain slightly bent.

To initiate the movement, exhale and bring your hands out on a wide arcing motion in front of you using your pectoral muscles to do so. Keep your chest as high as you can with your back in contact with the back rest. Continue to bring your hands together until they meet in the middle.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handles back along the same path into their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Flyes or Cable Crossovers.

en: chest
es: pecho

es: Siéntese en la máquina, mirando hacia adelante y ajuste la altura del asiento para que sus caderas y rodillas queden a 90 grados. A continuación, ajuste las manijas a la posición correcta para que estiren suavemente los músculos pectorales cuando las agarre. Agarre las manijas y asegúrese de que sus brazos estén paralelos al piso en este punto. Esta es tu posición inicial. Consejo: Mantenga los codos alineados con las muñecas y los hombros durante todo el movimiento y permanezcan ligeramente doblados.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhale y extienda las manos formando un amplio arco frente a usted utilizando los músculos pectorales para hacerlo. Mantenga el pecho lo más alto que pueda con la espalda en contacto con el respaldo. Continúe juntando las manos hasta que se encuentren en el medio.
Después de una breve pausa, inhale y regrese las manijas por el mismo camino a su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: aperturas con mancuernas o cruces con cable.

name: Abductor Machine External
instructions: Take a seat on the machine, placing the knee pads on the outside of your thighs with your feet in the stirrups. Make sure your knees and hips are at 90 degrees and you have the correct weight applied.
To initiate the movement, exhale and pull your knees apart until the pads are as wide as possible.
After a brief pause, inhale and reverse the movement returning the pads back along the same path into their starting position.

en: abductors
es: abductores

en: glutes
es: glúteos

en: Take a seat on the machine, placing the knee pads on the outside of your thighs with your feet in the stirrups. Make sure your knees and hips are at 90 degrees and you have the correct weight applied.
To initiate the movement, exhale and pull your knees apart until the pads are as wide as possible.
After a brief pause, inhale and reverse the movement returning the pads back along the same path into their starting position.
es: Siéntate en la máquina, colocando las rodilleras en la parte exterior de los muslos con los pies en los estribos. Asegúrese de que sus rodillas y caderas estén a 90 grados y de aplicar el peso correcto.
Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala y separa las rodillas hasta que las almohadillas estén lo más anchas posible.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala e invierte el movimiento devolviendo las almohadillas por el mismo camino a su posición inicial.

name: Standing Calf Raise Machine
instructions: Adjust the seat so that your legs are only slightly bent in the start position. The balls of your feet should be firmly on the platform.
Select an appropriate weight, and grasp the handles. This will be your starting position.

Straighten the legs by extending the knees, just barely lifting the weight from the stack. Your ankle should be fully flexed, toes pointing up. Execute the movement by pressing downward through the balls of your feet as far as possible.
After a brief pause, reverse the motion and repeat.

name.es: Máquina de elevación de gemelos de pie

en: calves
es: gemelos

en: Adjust the seat so that your legs are only slightly bent in the start position. The balls of your feet should be firmly on the platform.

es: Ajuste el asiento de modo que sus piernas queden ligeramente dobladas en la posición inicial. Las puntas de los pies deben estar firmemente apoyadas en la plataforma.
Seleccione un peso adecuado y agarre las asas. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Estire las piernas extendiendo las rodillas, levantando apenas el peso de la pila. Su tobillo debe estar completamente flexionado, con los dedos apuntando hacia arriba. Ejecute el movimiento presionando hacia abajo a través de las puntas de los pies lo más que pueda.
Después de una breve pausa, invierta el movimiento y repita.

name: Bicep Curl Machine
instructions: Sit down on the Preacher Curl Machine and select the weight.

Place the back of your upper arms (your triceps) on the preacher pad provided and grab the handles using an underhand grip (palms facing up).  Tip: Make sure that when you place the arms on the pad you keep the elbows in.  This will be your starting position.

Now lift the handles as you exhale and you contract the biceps.  At the top of the position make sure that you hold the contraction for a second.  Tip: Only the forearms should move.  The upper arms should remain stationary and on the pad at all times.
Lower the handles slowly back to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

Variations: You can use free weights (barbells and dumbbells) to perform this exercise on a preacher bench.  Alternatively, you can use the pulley machine as well in conjunction with a preacher bench.

en: biceps
es: bíceps

es: Siéntate en la máquina Preacher Curl y selecciona el peso.

Coloque la parte posterior de la parte superior de sus brazos (tríceps) sobre la almohadilla de predicador provista y agarre las manijas con las palmas hacia arriba.  Consejo: Asegúrate de que cuando coloques los brazos sobre la almohadilla mantengas los codos hacia adentro. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Ahora levanta las asas mientras exhalas y contraes el bíceps.  En la parte superior de la posición, asegúrate de mantener la contracción por un segundo.  Consejo: Sólo deben moverse los antebrazos.  La parte superior de los brazos debe permanecer fija y sobre la almohadilla en todo momento.
Baje las manijas lentamente hasta la posición inicial mientras inhala.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.

Variaciones: Puedes utilizar pesas libres (barras y mancuernas) para realizar este ejercicio en un banco de predicador.  Alternativamente, también puede utilizar la máquina de poleas junto con un banco de predicador.

name: Lying Hamstring Curls
instructions: Set the resistance of the machine to the prescribed amount and lay on the pad, face down with your heels tucked underneath the ankle brace. Lay with your forehead facing the floor so that your spine is in one straight line. Take hold of the handles and make sure your hips do not lift off the machine whilst you perform the movement. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull your heels in towards your glutes by contracting your hamstrings. Continue to pull the pad up and inwards on an arcing motion until the pad gently touches your glutes. Try to keep your hips down whilst you make this movement.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the pad back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Standing Hamstring Curl Machine or Natural Glute Ham Raises.

en: hamstrings
es: isquiosurales

es: Ajuste la resistencia de la máquina a la cantidad prescrita y recuéstese sobre la almohadilla, boca abajo con los talones metidos debajo de la tobillera. Acuéstese con la frente mirando al suelo de modo que la columna esté en línea recta. Sujeta las asas y asegúrate de que tus caderas no se levanten de la máquina mientras realizas el movimiento. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala y tira de los talones hacia los glúteos contrayendo los isquiosurales. Continúe tirando de la almohadilla hacia arriba y hacia adentro con un movimiento de arco hasta que la almohadilla toque suavemente sus glúteos. Intenta mantener las caderas hacia abajo mientras realizas este movimiento.
Después de una breve pausa, inhale y regrese la almohadilla por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: máquina de curl de isquiosurales de pie o elevaciones naturales de glúteos.

name: Chest Press Machine
instructions: Take a seat on the machine, facing forwards and adjust the height of the seat so that your hips and knees are at 90 degrees. Load the machine with the desired weight, grip the handles and make sure that your elbows are placed directly behind your wrists. This is your starting position.To initiate the movement, exhale and press the handles forward by flexing your pectoral muscles. It is important to try and relax your shoulders, keep your chest high and make sure your back stays in contact with the back rest. Continue to press the handles forward until either your pectoral muscles are fully contracted or your arms are fully extended (always have a slight bend when extended).After a brief pause, inhale and return the handles back along the same path into their starting position.Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.Variations: Dumbbell Bench Press or Smith Machine Bench Press.

It is important to try and relax your shoulders, keep your chest high and make sure your back stays in contact with the back rest. Continue to press the handles forward until either your pectoral muscles are fully contracted or your arms are fully extended (always have a slight bend when extended).After a brief pause, inhale and return the handles back along the same path into their starting position.Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.Variations: Dumbbell Bench Press or Smith Machine Bench Press.
es: Siéntese en la máquina, mirando hacia adelante y ajuste la altura del asiento para que sus caderas y rodillas queden a 90 grados. Cargue la máquina con el peso deseado, agarre las manijas y asegúrese de que sus codos estén colocados directamente detrás de sus muñecas. Esta es su posición inicial. Para iniciar el movimiento, exhale y presione las manijas hacia adelante flexionando los músculos pectorales. Es importante intentar relajar los hombros, mantener el pecho erguido y asegurarse de que la espalda permanezca en contacto con el respaldo. Continúe presionando las manijas hacia adelante hasta que sus músculos pectorales estén completamente contraídos o sus brazos estén completamente extendidos (siempre tenga una ligera flexión cuando estén extendidos). Después de una breve pausa, inhale y regrese las manijas por el mismo camino a su posición inicial. Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones. Variaciones: Press de banca con mancuernas o Press de banca con máquina Smith.

name: Leg Press
instructions: Set the machine to the desired weight and set the position of the seat (you will want your knees to be at a 90 degree angle when you get into position). Next take a seat and lift your feet up onto the foot plate in front of you. Have your feet shoulder width apart, your knees at 90 degrees and your lower back supported. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and press the foot plate away by putting pressure though your heels and shoes laces. Contract your thigh and glute muscles whilst simultaneously pulling your hips into the seat. Continue to press the foot plate away until your legs are fully extended (slight bend at your knees).
After a brief pause, inhale and return your legs back along the same path into their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Squats or Dumbbell Squats.

Next take a seat and lift your feet up onto the foot plate in front of you. Have your feet shoulder width apart, your knees at 90 degrees and your lower back supported. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and press the foot plate away by putting pressure though your heels and shoes laces. Contract your thigh and glute muscles whilst simultaneously pulling your hips into the seat. Continue to press the foot plate away until your legs are fully extended (slight bend at your knees).
After a brief pause, inhale and return your legs back along the same path into their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Squats or Dumbbell Squats.
es: Configure la máquina con el peso deseado y establezca la posición del asiento (querrá que sus rodillas estén en un ángulo de 90 grados cuando se coloque en posición). Luego, siéntese y levante los pies sobre la plataforma para pies frente a usted. Mantenga los pies separados a la altura de los hombros, las rodillas a 90 grados y la parte baja de la espalda apoyada. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhale y presione la placa para los pies hacia afuera ejerciendo presión a través de los talones y los cordones de los zapatos. Contraiga los músculos de los muslos y los glúteos mientras simultáneamente empuja las caderas hacia el asiento. Continúe presionando la plataforma para los pies hasta que las piernas estén completamente extendidas (doble ligeramente las rodillas).
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa las piernas por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Sentadillas con barra o Sentadillas con mancuernas.

name: Leg Extension
instructions: Set the machine to the desired weight and set the position of the back rest (when you sit on the machine, the back of your knees should be in contact with the edge of the seat). Next take a seat and lock the shin pad in place and take hold of the handles either side of you. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and extend your knees to bring your shins up towards the ceiling. In order to do so, contract your thigh muscles whilst simultaneously pulling your hips into the seat.
After a brief pause, inhale and return your lower legs back along the same path into their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: 45 Degree Leg Press Shoulder Width Stance or Alternating Dumbbell Lunges.

en: quadriceps
es: cuádriceps

en: Set the machine to the desired weight and set the position of the back rest (when you sit on the machine, the back of your knees should be in contact with the edge of the seat). Next take a seat and lock the shin pad in place and take hold of the handles either side of you. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and extend your knees to bring your shins up towards the ceiling. In order to do so, contract your thigh muscles whilst simultaneously pulling your hips into the seat.
After a brief pause, inhale and return your lower legs back along the same path into their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: 45 Degree Leg Press Shoulder Width Stance or Alternating Dumbbell Lunges.
es: Ajuste la máquina al peso deseado y ajuste la posición del respaldo (cuando se siente en la máquina, la parte posterior de las rodillas debe estar en contacto con el borde del asiento). Luego, siéntese, bloquee la espinillera en su lugar y sujete las manijas a cada lado de usted. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala y extiende las rodillas para llevar las espinillas hacia el techo. Para hacerlo, contraiga los músculos de los muslos mientras simultáneamente empuja las caderas hacia el asiento.
Después de una breve pausa, inhale y regrese la parte inferior de las piernas por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Postura de prensa de piernas a 45 grados a lo ancho de los hombros o estocadas alternas con mancuernas.

name: Tricep Dips
instructions: Set the bars of a dip machine to their 'narrow' setting and take a hold of them. Once you are ready, take your feet off the foot plates so that your arms are weight baring. Bent your knees behind you so they are at a 90 degree angle. Keep your elbows extended at this point with your elbows close to your torso. This will be your starting position. Tip: Keep your torso as up right as possible with a straight back throughout.
To initiate the movement, inhale, bend your elbows and descend your torso towards the floor until your elbows are at a 90 degree angle.
After a brief pause, exhale and return your torso back along the same path into its starting position by pushing through your triceps. Tip: Keep your elbows tucked in throughout the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Bench Dips or Cable Skull Crushers.

Bent your knees behind you so they are at a 90 degree angle. Keep your elbows extended at this point with your elbows close to your torso. This will be your starting position. Tip: Keep your torso as up right as possible with a straight back throughout.
To initiate the movement, inhale, bend your elbows and descend your torso towards the floor until your elbows are at a 90 degree angle.
After a brief pause, exhale and return your torso back along the same path into its starting position by pushing through your triceps. Tip: Keep your elbows tucked in throughout the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Bench Dips or Cable Skull Crushers.
es: Coloque las barras de una máquina de inmersión en su posición "estrecha" y sujételas. Una vez que esté listo, retire los pies de los reposapiés para que sus brazos queden al descubierto. Doble las rodillas detrás de usted para que formen un ángulo de 90 grados. Mantenga los codos extendidos en este punto con los codos cerca del torso. Esta será tu posición inicial. Consejo: mantenga el torso lo más erguido posible con la espalda recta en todo momento.
Para iniciar el movimiento, inhala, dobla los codos y baja el torso hacia el suelo hasta que los codos formen un ángulo de 90 grados.
Después de una breve pausa, exhala y regresa el torso por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial empujando los tríceps. Consejo: mantenga los codos doblados durante todo el movimiento.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: fondos en banco o trituradores de cráneos con cable.

name: Chest Supported Rows
instructions: Load up the T-bar Row Machine with the desired weight and adjust the leg height so that your upper chest is at the top of the pad. Tip: In some machines all you can do is stand on the appropriate step that allows you to be at a height that has the upper chest at the top of the pad.
Lay face down on the pad and grab the handles. You can either use a palms down, palms up, or palms in position depending on what part of your back you want to emphasize.
Lift the bar off the rack and extend your arms in front of you.  This will be your starting position.

As you exhale slowly pull the weight up and squeeze your back at the top of the movement. Tip: Keep the upper arms as close to the torso as possible throughout the movement in order to better engage the back muscles.  Also, do not lift your body off of the pad at any time and refrain from using the biceps to lift the weight.
After a second contraction at the top of the movement, as you inhale, slowly go back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

name.es: Remo con apoyo en el pecho

en: middle back
es: espalda media

en: Load up the T-bar Row Machine with the desired weight and adjust the leg height so that your upper chest is at the top of the pad. Tip: In some machines all you can do is stand on the appropriate step that allows you to be at a height that has the upper chest at the top of the pad.
Lay face down on the pad and grab the handles. You can either use a palms down, palms up, or palms in position depending on what part of your back you want to emphasize.
Lift the bar off the rack and extend your arms in front of you.  This will be your starting position.

As you exhale slowly pull the weight up and squeeze your back at the top of the movement. Tip: Keep the upper arms as close to the torso as possible throughout the movement in order to better engage the back muscles.  Also, do not lift your body off of the pad at any time and refrain from using the biceps to lift the weight.
After a second contraction at the top of the movement, as you inhale, slowly go back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
es: Cargue la máquina de remo con barra en T con el peso deseado y ajuste la altura de las piernas para que la parte superior del pecho quede en la parte superior de la almohadilla. Consejo: En algunas máquinas lo único que puedes hacer es pararte en el escalón adecuado que te permita estar a una altura que tenga la parte superior del pecho en la parte superior de la almohadilla.

Acuéstese boca abajo sobre la almohadilla y agarre las asas. Puede usar las palmas hacia abajo, las palmas hacia arriba o las palmas en posición dependiendo de qué parte de su espalda desee enfatizar.
Levanta la barra del soporte y extiende los brazos frente a ti.  Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras exhalas, levanta lentamente el peso y aprieta la espalda en la parte superior del movimiento. Consejo: Mantenga la parte superior de los brazos lo más cerca posible del torso durante todo el movimiento para activar mejor los músculos de la espalda.  Además, no levante su cuerpo de la almohadilla en ningún momento y absténgase de utilizar los bíceps para levantar el peso.
Después de una segunda contracción en la parte superior del movimiento, mientras inhala, regrese lentamente a la posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.

name: Chest Dips
instructions: Set the bars of a dip machine to their 'wide' setting and take a hold of them. Once you are ready, take your feet off the foot plates so that your arms are weight baring. Bent your knees behind you so they are at a 90 degree angle. Keep your elbows extended at this point and gently lean your torso forward by 20-30 degrees. This will be your starting position. Tip: Keep a straight back throughout.
To initiate the movement, inhale, bend your elbows and descend your torso towards the floor until your elbows are at a 90 degree angle.
After a brief pause, exhale and return your torso back along the same path into its starting position by pushing through your chest and triceps.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Smith Machine Bench Press or Machine Bench Press.

en: Set the bars of a dip machine to their 'wide' setting and take a hold of them. Once you are ready, take your feet off the foot plates so that your arms are weight baring. Bent your knees behind you so they are at a 90 degree angle. Keep your elbows extended at this point and gently lean your torso forward by 20-30 degrees. This will be your starting position. Tip: Keep a straight back throughout.
To initiate the movement, inhale, bend your elbows and descend your torso towards the floor until your elbows are at a 90 degree angle.
After a brief pause, exhale and return your torso back along the same path into its starting position by pushing through your chest and triceps.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Smith Machine Bench Press or Machine Bench Press.
es: Coloque las barras de una máquina de inmersión en su posición "ancha" y sujételas. Una vez que esté listo, retire los pies de los reposapiés para que sus brazos queden al descubierto. Doble las rodillas detrás de usted para que formen un ángulo de 90 grados. Mantenga los codos extendidos en este punto e incline suavemente el torso hacia adelante entre 20 y 30 grados. Esta será tu posición inicial. Consejo: mantenga la espalda recta en todo momento.
Para iniciar el movimiento, inhala, dobla los codos y baja el torso hacia el suelo hasta que los codos formen un ángulo de 90 grados.
Después de una breve pausa, exhala y regresa el torso por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial empujando a través del pecho y los tríceps.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press de banca con máquina Smith o Press de banca con máquina.

name: Bodyweight Bulgarian Split Squats
instructions: Being in a standing position. Jump into a split leg position, with one leg forward and one leg back, flexing the knees and lowering your hips slightly as you do so.
As you descend, immediately reverse direction, standing back up and jumping, reversing the position of your legs. Repeat 5-10 times on each leg.

name.es: Sentadillas divididas búlgaras con peso corporal

en: Being in a standing position. Jump into a split leg position, with one leg forward and one leg back, flexing the knees and lowering your hips slightly as you do so.
As you descend, immediately reverse direction, standing back up and jumping, reversing the position of your legs. Repeat 5-10 times on each leg.
es: Estar en posición de pie. Salta a una posición de pierna dividida, con una pierna hacia adelante y otra hacia atrás, flexionando las rodillas y bajando ligeramente las caderas mientras lo haces.
A medida que desciendes, invierte inmediatamente la dirección, levantándote y saltando, invirtiendo la posición de tus piernas. Repita de 5 a 10 veces en cada pierna.

name: Narrow Grip Press Ups
instructions: Lie on the floor face down and place your hands closer than shoulder width for a close hand position. Make sure that you are holding your torso up at arms' length.
Lower yourself until your chest almost touches the floor as you inhale.
Using your triceps and some of your pectoral muscles, press your upper body back up to the starting position and squeeze your chest. Breathe out as you perform this step.
After a second pause at the contracted position, repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Variations:

If you are new at this exercise and do not have the strength to perform it, you can either bend your legs at the knees to take off resistance or perform the exercise against the wall instead of the floor.
For the most advanced lifters, you can place your feet at a high surface such as a bench in order to increase the resistance.
See Also: Push-Up

Lower yourself until your chest almost touches the floor as you inhale.
Using your triceps and some of your pectoral muscles, press your upper body back up to the starting position and squeeze your chest. Breathe out as you perform this step.

Variations:

If you are new at this exercise and do not have the strength to perform it, you can either bend your legs at the knees to take off resistance or perform the exercise against the wall instead of the floor.
For the most advanced lifters, you can place your feet at a high surface such as a bench in order to increase the resistance.

es: Acuéstese en el suelo boca abajo y coloque las manos más cerca que el ancho de los hombros para lograr una posición más cercana. Asegúrate de sostener el torso con los brazos extendidos.
Bájate hasta que tu pecho casi toque el suelo mientras inhalas.
Usando los tríceps y algunos de los músculos pectorales, presione la parte superior del cuerpo hacia la posición inicial y apriete el pecho. Exhale mientras realiza este paso.
Después de una segunda pausa en la posición contraída, repita el movimiento durante la cantidad prescrita de repeticiones.
Variaciones:

Si eres nuevo en este ejercicio y no tienes la fuerza para realizarlo, puedes doblar las piernas a la altura de las rodillas para quitar resistencia o realizar el ejercicio contra la pared en lugar del suelo.
Para los levantadores más avanzados, puedes colocar los pies en una superficie alta, como un banco, para aumentar la resistencia.
Ver también: Flexiones

name: Wide Grip Pull Ups
instructions: Take hold of a pull up bar with a wide, overhand grip (palms facing away from you). After you have securely taken hold of the handles, take your feet off the floor so that your body is now hanging from your grip. Pull your heels in towards your glutes so your knees are bent to a 90 degree angle and your hips are pushed forwards. Your arms should be at full extension at this point. This will be your starting position.

To initiate this movement, exhale and pull your torso upward towards your hands as you contract your biceps and the muscles across your back (more so with your back). Continue to pull yourself up until your chest is as high as it can be.
After a brief pause, return your torso back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Lat Pulldowns or T-Bar Rows with a Handle.

Pull your heels in towards your glutes so your knees are bent to a 90 degree angle and your hips are pushed forwards. Your arms should be at full extension at this point. This will be your starting position.

To initiate this movement, exhale and pull your torso upward towards your hands as you contract your biceps and the muscles across your back (more so with your back). Continue to pull yourself up until your chest is as high as it can be.
After a brief pause, return your torso back along the same path into its starting position.

Variations: Lat Pulldowns or T-Bar Rows with a Handle.
es: Sujete una barra de dominadas con un agarre amplio y por encima de la cabeza (con las palmas hacia afuera). Después de haber agarrado firmemente las manijas, levante los pies del piso para que su cuerpo cuelgue de su agarre. Tire de los talones hacia los glúteos para que las rodillas queden dobladas en un ángulo de 90 grados y las caderas empujadas hacia adelante. Tus brazos deben estar completamente extendidos en este punto. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar este movimiento, exhale y tire del torso hacia las manos mientras contrae los bíceps y los músculos de la espalda (más aún en la espalda). Continúe levantándose hasta que su pecho esté lo más alto posible.
Después de una breve pausa, regrese el torso por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Jalones laterales o remo con barra en T con mango.

name: Parallel Bar Dips
instructions: Stand between a set of parallel bars. Place a hand on each bar, and then take a small jump to help you get into the starting position with your arms locked out.
Begin by flexing the elbow, lowering your body until your arms break 90 degrees. Avoid swinging, and maintain good posture throughout the descent.
Reverse the motion by extending the elbow, pushing yourself back up into the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

es: Párate entre un conjunto de barras paralelas. Coloque una mano en cada barra y luego dé un pequeño salto para ayudarlo a llegar a la posición inicial con los brazos bloqueados.
Comienza flexionando el codo, bajando el cuerpo hasta que los brazos rompan los 90 grados. Evite balancearse y mantenga una buena postura durante todo el descenso.
Invierta el movimiento extendiendo el codo y empujándose hacia arriba hasta la posición inicial.
Repita hasta el número deseado de repeticiones.

name: Mountain Climbers
instructions: Start off in a press up position with your hands just wider than shoulder width and your toes being the only other point of contact with the floor. Your body should be suspended in a straight line from your heels to your shoulders above the floor. This will be your starting position.
Bring your right knee underneath your body so that it is as close to your chest as you can get it.
Exhale and swap your right leg for your left and as fast as you can.
Continue to alternate your legs and bring each knee in as close to your chest as possible. Tip: Take shallow breaths whilst you are performing the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Ab Bike or High Knees.

en: Start off in a press up position with your hands just wider than shoulder width and your toes being the only other point of contact with the floor. Your body should be suspended in a straight line from your heels to your shoulders above the floor. This will be your starting position.
Bring your right knee underneath your body so that it is as close to your chest as you can get it.
Exhale and swap your right leg for your left and as fast as you can.
Continue to alternate your legs and bring each knee in as close to your chest as possible. Tip: Take shallow breaths whilst you are performing the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Ab Bike or High Knees.
es: Comience en una posición de flexión hacia arriba con las manos un poco más anchas que el ancho de los hombros y los dedos de los pies siendo el único otro punto de contacto con el suelo. Su cuerpo debe estar suspendido en línea recta desde los talones hasta los hombros por encima del suelo. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Coloque la rodilla derecha debajo de su cuerpo para que quede lo más cerca posible de su pecho.
Exhala y cambia tu pierna derecha por la izquierda y lo más rápido que puedas.
Continúe alternando las piernas y acerque cada rodilla lo más posible al pecho. Consejo: respire superficialmente mientras realiza el movimiento.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Ab Bike o Rodillas Altas.

name: Alternating Bodyweight Curtsy Squats
instructions: Stand with your feet shoulder width apart. This will be your starting position.
Perform a rear lunge by stepping back with one foot and flexing the hips and front knee. As you do so, rotate your torso across the front leg.
After a brief pause, return to the starting position and repeat on the other side, continuing in an alternating fashion.

name.es: Sentadillas con reverencias alternas con peso corporal

en: Stand with your feet shoulder width apart. This will be your starting position.
Perform a rear lunge by stepping back with one foot and flexing the hips and front knee. As you do so, rotate your torso across the front leg.
After a brief pause, return to the starting position and repeat on the other side, continuing in an alternating fashion.
es: Párese con los pies separados a la altura de los hombros. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Realice una estocada trasera dando un paso atrás con un pie y flexionando las caderas y la rodilla delantera. Mientras lo hace, gire el torso sobre la pierna delantera.
Después de una breve pausa, regresa a la posición inicial y repite del otro lado, continuando de forma alterna.

name: Chin Ups
instructions: Take hold of a pull up bar with a shoulder width, underhand grip (palms facing towards you). After you have securely taken hold of the handles, take your feet off the floor so that your body is now hanging from your grip. Pull your heels in towards your glutes so your knees are bent to a 90 degree angle and your hips are pushed forwards. Your arms should be at full extension at this point. This will be your starting position.

To initiate this movement, exhale and pull your torso upward towards your palms as you contract your biceps and the muscles across your back. Continue to pull yourself up until your chest is as high as you can get it.
After a brief pause, return your torso back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Underhand Cable Pulldowns or Horizontal Barbell Pull Ups.

Después de haber agarrado firmemente las manijas, levante los pies del piso para que su cuerpo cuelgue de su agarre. Tire de los talones hacia los glúteos para que las rodillas queden dobladas en un ángulo de 90 grados y las caderas empujadas hacia adelante. Tus brazos deben estar completamente extendidos en este punto. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Para iniciar este movimiento, exhale y tire del torso hacia las palmas mientras contrae los bíceps y los músculos de la espalda. Continúe levantándose hasta que su pecho esté lo más alto que pueda.
Después de una breve pausa, regrese el torso por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: dominadas con cable por debajo o dominadas horizontales con barra.

name: Bent Knee Hip Raises
instructions: Lay down on a mat (face up) with your knees bent to a 90 degree angle (feet still on the floor) with your arms placed beside your torso. This will be your starting position.
Exhale and use your lower abs to lift your feet up and off the floor and contract your knees in towards your chest (maintain the bend at your knees throughout the movement).
Once your abs are as tight as they can be, inhale and return your knees back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Cocoons or Reverse Crunches.

name.es: Elevaciones de cadera con rodilla doblada

en: abdominals

en: Lay down on a mat (face up) with your knees bent to a 90 degree angle (feet still on the floor) with your arms placed beside your torso. This will be your starting position.
Exhale and use your lower abs to lift your feet up and off the floor and contract your knees in towards your chest (maintain the bend at your knees throughout the movement).
Once your abs are as tight as they can be, inhale and return your knees back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Cocoons or Reverse Crunches.
es: Acuéstese sobre una colchoneta (boca arriba) con las rodillas dobladas en un ángulo de 90 grados (los pies todavía en el suelo) y los brazos colocados al lado del torso. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Exhale y use sus abdominales inferiores para levantar los pies del piso y contraer las rodillas hacia el pecho (mantenga las rodillas dobladas durante todo el movimiento).
Una vez que tus abdominales estén lo más tensos posible, inhala y regresa las rodillas por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variación: Capullos o Crujidos Inversos.

name: Bench Dips
instructions: Place your hands just wider than shoulder width on the side of a bench and elevate your feet onto a parallel bench. Your legs should be straight with your hips at a 90 degree angle suspended off the floor. This will be your starting position.
To initiate this movement, inhale and descend your pelvis towards the floor through gently bending your elbows until they create a 90 degree angle.
Pause for a brief moment in this position, then exhale and flex your triceps to extend your elbows, returning your torso back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Narrow Grip Bench Press or Tricep Rope Extension.

es: Coloque las manos un poco más anchas que el ancho de los hombros al costado de un banco y levante los pies sobre un banco paralelo. Tus piernas deben estar rectas con las caderas en un ángulo de 90 grados suspendidas del suelo. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Para iniciar este movimiento, inhale y descienda la pelvis hacia el suelo doblando suavemente los codos hasta crear un ángulo de 90 grados.
Haga una pausa por un breve momento en esta posición, luego exhale y flexione los tríceps para extender los codos, regresando el torso por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press de banca con agarre estrecho o extensión de cuerda para tríceps.

name: Ankle Circles
instructions: Adopt either a standing or seated stance with your torso supported. This will be your starting position.
Lift your right foot a couple of inches off the floor and draw a big circle with your big toe.
Continue in this fashion until you have completed the required amount of repetitions and swap sides.

Lift your right foot a couple of inches off the floor and draw a big circle with your big toe.

es: Adopte una postura de pie o sentado con el torso apoyado. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Levante el pie derecho unos centímetros del suelo y dibuje un círculo grande con el dedo gordo.
Continúe de esta manera hasta que haya completado la cantidad requerida de repeticiones y cambie de lado.

name: Bodyweight Squats
instructions: Adopt a wide standing stance with your hands behind your head, elbows relaxed out wide. This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, inhale and bend at your knees and hips to descend your pelvis either in line or just past your knees. Tip: Keep a straight back throughout and maintain good posture.
Once you get to the bottom of the movement, exhale and press through your heels to extend your hip and knee joints, elevating your torso back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Squats or Barbell Squats.

es: Adopte una postura amplia de pie con las manos detrás de la cabeza y los codos completamente relajados. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, inhale y doble las rodillas y las caderas para descender la pelvis, ya sea en línea o justo por encima de las rodillas. Consejo: Mantenga la espalda recta en todo momento y mantenga una buena postura.

Una vez que llegue al final del movimiento, exhale y presione con los talones para extender las articulaciones de la cadera y la rodilla, elevando el torso hacia atrás por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: sentadillas con mancuernas o sentadillas con barra.

name: Alternating Kettlebell Renegade Rows
instructions: Place two kettlebells on the floor about shoulder width apart. Adopt an 'all-fours' position but instead of having your hands on the floor, take hold of the kettlebells with a neutral (palms facing each other) grip. At this point you should extend your legs out behind you so that your body is suspended above the floor in a straight line with your toes and the kettlebells being the only points of contact you have with the floor. The kettlebells should be directly below your chest so that your arms are perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position.

Whilst exhaling, row one of the kettlebells towards the side of your torso by squeezing the muscles in your back. Continue to pull your elbow as high as you can until your body wants to rotate. Keep your other arm stationary in the starting position.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the kettlebell back along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat for the opposite side and alternate between arms.
Continue in this manner until you complete the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Single Arm Rows or Alternating Dumbbell Renegade Rows.

Adopta unan 'all-fours' posición but instead of having tu manos on el suelo, agarra the kettlebells with a neutral (palmaas enfrentadas) grip. At this point should extiende tu piernas out detrás de so that tu cuerpo is suspended por encima de el suelo in a recto line con tu toes and the kettlebells being the only points of contact have with el suelo. The kettlebells should be directamente below tu pecho so that tu brazos are perpendicular to el suelo. Esta será tu posición inicial.

mientras exhaling, row one of the kettlebells hacia the lado of tu torso by squeezing the muscles in tu espalda. Continúa to tira tu codo as high as can hasta que tu cuerpo wants to rota. Mantén tu other brazo stationary in la posición inicial.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala and vuelve the kettlebell espalda along the same path to la posición inicial.
Repite for the contrario lado and alternate entre brazos.
Continúa in this manner hasta que complete the número indicado de repeticiones.

name: Alternating Kettlebell Hang Clean
instructions: Grab a kettlebell in each hand and adopt a slightly wider than shoulder width stance. Take hold of the kettlebells with an overhand grip (palms facing your thighs) and stand upright with your arms hanging perpendicular to the floor in front of your body. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and bring one of the kettlebells up to shoulder height whilst relaxing your grip to allow the kettlebell to swing up and over to the back of your wrist. To do this, you will need to pull your elbow up toward the ceiling as fast as you can.

Immediately after doing this, take shallow breaths and return the kettlebell back along the same path back to its starting position. Whilst you are returning the first kettlebell back to its original position, pull your other kettlebell up to your shoulder. Once again, pull your elbow upwards as fast as you can and relax your grip to allow the kettlebell to flip over to the reverse side of your wrist.
Continue to alternate as you go and repeat this movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Cleans or Dumbbell Cleans.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala and lleva one of the kettlebells up to hombro height mientras relaxing tu grip to permite the kettlebell to swing up and over to la espalda of tu wrist. To do this, will debes tira tu codo up toward el techo as rápido as puedas.

Immediately after doing this, take shpermite breaths and vuelve the kettlebell espalda along the same path espalda to its posición inicial. mientras are vuelveing the first kettlebell espalda to its original posición, tira tu other kettlebell up to tu hombro. name: Alternating Kettlebell Bent Over Rows
instructions: Grab a kettlebell in each hand (palms facing your torso), bend your knees slightly and bring your torso forward by bending at your hips; as you bend make sure to keep your back straight until it is almost parallel to the floor. Tip: Make sure that you keep your spine in a neutral position. The weights should hang directly in front of you as your arms are perpendicular to the floor and your torso. This is your starting position.

While keeping the torso stationary, lift one of the kettlebells to your side (as you exhale), elevating your elbow towards the ceiling (do not exert any force with the forearm other than holding the weights). At the top contracted position, squeeze the back muscles and hold for a second.
Slowly lower the weight to the starting position as you inhale.
Once you have completed this movement, repeat for the opposite side.
Continue in this manner until you have completed the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution:
This exercise is not recommended for people with back issues. A Low Cable Row is a better choice for people with back pain.
Ensure perfect form and never round the back as this can cause injury.
Be cautious with the weights you are using. If you are in doubt, use a lesser weight.
Variations: Dumbbell Bent Over Rows or Barbell Bent Over Rows.

Consejo: Make sure that mantén tu spine in a neutral posición. The pesos should hang directamente delante de as tu brazos are perpendicular to el suelo and tu torso. Esta es tu posición inicial.

While manténing the torso stationary, eleva one of the kettlebells to tu lado (as exhala), elevating tu codo hacia el techo (do not exert any fuerza with the antebrazo other than holding the pesos). At the parte superior contracted posición, squeeze la espalda muscles and hold for a second.
Slowly baja the peso to la posición inicial as inhala.
Once have completed this movimiento, repeat for the contrario lado.
Continúa in this manner hasta que have completed the número indicado de repeticiones.
Precaución:
This exercise is not recommended for people with espalda issues. A Low Cable Row is a better choice for people with espalda pain.
Ensure perfect form and never round la espalda as this can cause injury.
Be cautious with the pesos are using. If are in doubt, use a lesser peso.
Variaciones: Dumbbell Bent Over Rows or Barbell Bent Over Rows.

name: Sit Ups
instructions: Grab a mat and lay down flat on your back. Place your hands gently on your temples/chest and bend your knees so that you have a 90 degree angle (you can tuck your feet under a couple of dumbbells for assistance). This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and curl your shoulders up and off the mat towards your knees by contracting your abdominal muscles. Continue in this fashion until your torso is vertical to the floor and your chest is very close to your knees.
After a brief pause, inhale and return your body back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Crunches or Cable Crunches.

en: abdominals

es: Coge a colchoneta and lay down flat on tu espalda. Coloca tu manos suavemente on tu temples/pecho and flexiona tu rodillas so that have a 90 degree angle ( can tuck tu pies under a couple of mancuernas for assipostura). Esta será tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala and curl tu hombros up and off the colchoneta hacia tu rodillas by contracting tu músculos abdominales. Continúa in this fashion hasta que tu torso is vertical to el suelo and tu pecho is very cerca de tu rodillas.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala and vuelve tu cuerpo espalda along the same path into la posición inicial.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Crunches or Cable Crunches.

name: Reverse Crunches
instructions: Grab a mat and lay down flat on your back. Have your hands gently placed on your temples with your knees and hips bent at a 90 degree angle. Your thighs should be vertical from the floor and lower legs parallel to the floor. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull your knees in towards your torso by contracting your abdominal muscles. Continue with this movement until your knees are as close to your shoulders as they can be.
After a brief pause, inhale and return your body along the same path back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Flat Bench Leg Pull-In or Cocoons.

en: abdominals
es: abdominales

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala and tira tu rodillas in hacia tu torso by contracting tu músculos abdominales. Continúa with this movimiento hasta que tu rodillas are as cerca de tu hombros as they can be.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala and vuelve tu cuerpo along the same path espalda to la posición inicial.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Flat Bench Leg Tira-In or Cocoons.

name: Plank
instructions: Firstly, place a mat on the floor underneath your torso as you adopt an 'all-fours' position above it. From here you will need to bend your elbows to a 90 degree angle and place your upper body weight onto your forearms. After you have done that, take a step backwards with your feet and place your remaining bodyweight through your toes. At this point your body should be suspended (in a straight line) above the floor with just your forearms and toes as points of contact. This will be your starting position.

Keep your abdominal muscles tight throughout this exercise and keep your pelvis in line with the rest of your body to minimise risk of injury to your lower back (you can elevate your pelvis slightly to reduce lower back pain).
Hold this position for as long as you can or for the recommended amount of time.

From here will debes flexiona tu codos to a 90 degree angle and coloca tu upper peso corporal onto tu antebrazos. After have done that, take a step hacia atráss con tu pies and coloca tu remaining peso corporal through tu toes. At this point tu cuerpo should be suspended (in a recto line) por encima de el suelo with just tu antebrazos and toes as points of contact. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mantén tu músculos abdominales tight durante todo this exercise and mantén tu pelvis in line with the rest of tu cuerpo to minimise risk of injury to tu zona lumbar ( can eleva tu pelvis slightly to reduce zona lumbar pain).
Hold this posición for as long as can or for the recommended cantidad of time.

name: Hanging Leg Raises
instructions: Take hold of a chin up bar/handles and allow your body to hang perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and elevate your legs in front of your body by contracting your abdominal muscles (either keeping them as straight as possible, or bending at the knees) until they create a 90 degree angle with your torso (if you have bent your knees, you should have a 90 degree angle at both your hips and knees).
After a brief pause, inhale and return your legs back along the same path into the starting position. Tip: This movement should be slow and controlled so that you do not swing.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Hip Raises or Flat Bench Leg Pull Ins.

en: abdominals
es: abdominales

en: Take hold of a chin up bar/handles and allow your body to hang perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and elevate your legs in front of your body by contracting your abdominal muscles (either keeping them as straight as possible, or bending at the knees) until they create a 90 degree angle with your torso (if you have bent your knees, you should have a 90 degree angle at both your hips and knees).
After a brief pause, inhale and return your legs back along the same path into the starting position. Tip: This movement should be slow and controlled so that you do not swing.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

es: Agarra a chin up bar/manoles and permite tu cuerpo to hang perpendicular to el suelo. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala and eleva tu piernas delante de tu cuerpo by contracting tu músculos abdominales (either manténing them as recto lo máximo posible, or flexionaing at the rodillas) hasta que they create a 90 degree angle con tu torso (if have bent tu rodillas, should have a 90 degree angle at both tu caderas and rodillas).
Después de una breve pausa, inhala and vuelve tu piernas espalda along the same path into la posición inicial. Consejo: This movimiento should be lento and controlled so that do not swing.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Hip Elevas or Flat Bench Leg Tira Ins.

name: Alternating Heel Touches
instructions: Grab a mat and lay down flat on your back. Place your hands gently on your chest and lift your legs so that you have a 90 degree angle at both your hips and knees. Crunch your abs so that you lift your shoulders up from the mat and you are ready to go. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and reach around the side of your body with your right hand towards your right heel, your legs should remain stationary. Tip: To acheive a peak contraction, crunch upward slightly as you go.
After a brief pause inhale and return your body along the same path back to the starting position.
Now repeat the movement for your left hand side. Exhale and reach around your body with your left arm towards your left heel. Inhale and return to the starting position.
Continue alternating in this manner until you complete the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Weighted Side Bends.

en: abdominals
es: abdominales

en: Grab a mat and lay down flat on your back. Place your hands gently on your chest and lift your legs so that you have a 90 degree angle at both your hips and knees. Crunch your abs so that you lift your shoulders up from the mat and you are ready to go. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and reach around the side of your body with your right hand towards your right heel, your legs should remain stationary. Tip: To acheive a peak contraction, crunch upward slightly as you go.
After a brief pause inhale and return your body along the same path back to the starting position.
Now repeat the movement for your left hand side. Exhale and reach around your body with your left arm towards your left heel. Inhale and return to the starting position.
Continue alternating in this manner until you complete the recommended amount of repetitions.

es: Coge a colchoneta and lay down flat on tu espalda. Coloca tu manos suavemente on tu pecho and eleva tu piernas so that have a 90 degree angle at both tu caderas and rodillas. Crunch tu abs so that eleva tu hombros up from the colchoneta and are ready to go. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala and reach around the lado of tu cuerpo con tu derecho mano hacia tu derecho talón, tu piernas should remain stationary. Consejo: To acheive a peak contraction, crunch arriba slightly durante el movimiento.
Después de una breve pausa inhala and vuelve tu cuerpo along the same path espalda to la posición inicial.
Now repeat the movimiento for tu izquierdo mano lado. Exhala and reach around tu cuerpo con tu izquierdo brazo hacia tu izquierdo talón. Inhala and vuelve to la posición inicial.
Continúa alternating in this manner hasta que complete the número indicado de repeticiones.
Variación: Weighted Side Flexionas.

name: Ab Wheels Rollout
instructions: Grab an ab-wheel and place it on the floor at the end of a mat. Kneel down on the mat and adopt an overhand grip on the wheel. With a bend at your knees and hips, lean your bodyweight forward so that your (straight) arms are holding you upright. This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, inhale and slowly roll the wheel forward, stretching your arms out as far as you can whilst dropping your pelvis down at the same time.
After a brief pause, exhale and use your abdominal muscles to pull the wheel back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: If you suffer from any lower back pain or hernias, this exercise is not suitable.
Variation: Barbell Roll Out.

es: abdominales

Variation: Barbell Roll Out.
es: Coge an ab-wtalón and coloca it on el suelo at the end of a colchoneta. Kneel down on the colchoneta and adopt an agarre prono on the wtalón. With a flexiona at tu rodillas and caderas, inclínate tu peso corporal hacia delante so that tu (recto) brazos are holding erguido. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Para iniciar el movimiento, inhala and lentamente roll the wtalón hacia delante, estiramientoing tu brazos out todo lo as can mientras dropping tu pelvis down at the same time.
Después de una breve pausa, exhala and use tu músculos abdominales to tira the wtalón espalda along the same path into la posición inicial.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones.
Precaución: If suffer from any zona lumbar pain or hernias, this exercise is not suitable.
Variación: Barbell Roll Out.

name: 3:4 Sit Up
instructions: Grab a mat and lay down flat on your back. Place your hands gently on your temples/chest and bend your knees so that you have a 90 degree angle (you can tuck your feet under a couple of dumbbells for assistance). This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and curl your shoulders up and off the mat towards your knees by contracting your abdominal muscles. Continue in this fashion until your torso is 3/4 of the way towards being vertical to the floor.
After a brief pause, inhale and return your body back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Crunches or Sit-Ups.

es: Coge a colchoneta and lay down flat on tu espalda. Coloca tu manos suavemente on tu temples/pecho and flexiona tu rodillas so that have a 90 degree angle ( can tuck tu pies under a couple of mancuernas for assipostura). Esta será tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala and curl tu hombros up and off the colchoneta hacia tu rodillas by contracting tu músculos abdominales. Continúa in this fashion hasta que tu torso is 3/4 of the way hacia being vertical to el suelo.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala and vuelve tu cuerpo espalda along the same path into la posición inicial.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Crunches or Siéntate-Ups.

name: Wide Grip Lat Pulldown
instructions: Set the weight to the recommended amount and check that the leg brace is set to the correct height. Take a seat facing the machine (tuck your hips in so they are touching the leg brace) and take a wide, overhand grip with your arms extended towards the ceiling. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the bar down towards your chest using the muscles across your back and your biceps. Lean back ever so slightly as your pull the weight downwards and lift your chest as much as you can. Continue to pull the bar down until either your muscles are optimally contracted or it is in contact with your chest.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the bar back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Pull-Ups or Cable Pullovers.

es: Coloca the peso to the recommended amount and check that the leg brace is set to the correct height. Take a seat facing the máquina (tuck your caderas in so they are touching the leg brace) and take a wide, overmano grip with your brazos extended hacia the techo. Esta es la posición inicial.

To initiate the movimiento, espira and pull the barra down hacia your pecho using the muscles across your espalda and your bíceps. name: Cable Tricep Push Down V Bar Attachment
instructions: Attach a V-bar to a high cable pulley. Adopt a shoulder width, upright stance (about 18 inches away from the machine) and take hold of the bar with an overhand grip (palm facing the floor).

Once you have hold of the bar, take the weight by tucking your elbow into the side of your torso. Your forearms and upper arms should create an acute angle (less than 90 degrees) when ready to go. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and push the bar down towards your thighs on an arcing motion. Use your triceps to do this and contract fully when your arms are by your thighs. At this point, your arms should be perpendicular to the floor. Tip: Keep your elbows tucked in to your sides as only the forearms should move.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the bar along the same path back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Tricep Kickbacks or Overhead Tricep Extensions.

name: Standing Cable Crunches
instructions: Adopt a shoulder width stance underneath a high cable with a rope attached. Face away from the machine but be as close to it as possible, keep your legs straight throughout (slight bend at the knees). When setting the weight for this exercise, be cautious as if it is too heavy, your abs will not be taking the load and your lower back will play a part.
Take hold of the ropes and bring them down so they are next to your head on your upper chest. Push your hips back and lean forward from your hips so that your torso is taking the weight.

From here you should try to arch your back by taking a deep breath, pulling your shoulders back and pushing your chest out. This will be your starting position. Tip: Throughout this movement your hips and your lower limbs should remain stationary.

Exhale and flex your abs to move your shoulders (and rope) downward towards your thighs. As you flex your abs, the arch in your back reverses so that your back is now rounding over. Your elbows should remain as close to your torso as possible throughout.
After a brief pause, inhale and return along the same path to your starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: If you suffer from lower back pain, be cautious of the resistance.
Variations: Kneeling Cable Crunches or Cocoons.

name: Cable Curls
instructions: Attach a straight bar to a low cable pulley and take hold of it with an underhand grip (palms facing upwards). Stand upright around 12 inches away from the cable, maintaining a straight back throughout.

Whilst holding the upper arm stationary, exhale as you curl the bar up towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps. Continue the movement until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze your biceps.
(Tip: Only the forearms should move.)
Inhale as you slowly begin to return the bar along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Standing Hammer Curls or Barbell Bicep Curls.

name: Pallof Press
instructions: Attach a handle to a cable pulley that is at chest height and adopt a shoulder width stance adjacent to the cable machine (on your right side) about a foot away.
Take hold of the handle with an both hands, bend your elbows and keep your hands tucked in to your chest at this point. This will be your starting position. Tip: Maintain good posture throughout.
Exhale and press your hands out in front of your torso, keeping them parallel to the floor as you go. Continue to press forwards until your arms are at full extension.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handle back along the same path to its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.

name: Seated Cable Rows
instructions: Attach two handles to a low cable pulley, take hold of them with a neutral grip and sit about 2 feet away from the pulley system. Once seated, you should have your arms and legs out in front of you (slightly bent) with your posture held in an upright position (this is paramount to maintain throughout the movement) with your chest pushed out. This is your starting position.

Exhale and pull the handles in towards your lower abdominals by contracting your back muscles. Your posture should remain upright throughout the movement and your arms should remain as passive as possible.
Once the handles touch your abdominals, pause for a brief moment before inhaling and returning them along the same path back into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: If you suffer from back pain, this may not be a suitable movement for you.
Variations: Landmine T Bar Rows or Underhand Cable Pulldowns.

name: Cable Hammer Curls Rope
instructions: Attach a rope to a low cable pulley. Take hold of the ropes with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) making sure that the plastic/rubber part on the end is touching your thumbs and index fingers. Stand upright around 12 inches away from the cable, maintaining a straight back throughout.

Whilst holding the upper arm stationary, exhale as you curl the rope up towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps. Continue the movement until your biceps are fully contracted and the the rope is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze your biceps.
(Tip: Only the forearms should move.)
Inhale as you slowly begin to return the rope along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Standing Hammer Curls or Seated Hammer Curls.

name: Cable Crunches
instructions: Adopt a kneeling position underneath a high cable with a rope attached. When setting the weight for this exercise, be cautious as if it is too heavy, your abs will not be taking the load and your lower back will play a part.
Take hold of the ropes and bring them down so they are beside your head on your upper chest. Push your hips back and lean forward to create a 90 degree angle from your lower back and thighs.

From here you should try to arch your back by taking a deep breath, pulling your shoulders back and pushing your chest out. This will be your starting position. Tip: Throughout this movement your hips and your lower limbs should remain stationary.

Exhale and flex your abs to move your shoulders (and rope) downward towards your thighs. As you flex your abs, the arch in your back reverses so that your back is now rounding over. Your elbows should remain as close to your torso as possible throughout.
After a brief pause, inhale and return along the same path to your starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: If you suffer from lower back pain, be cautious of the resistance.
Variations: Crunches or Cocoons.
