name: Alternating Barbell Lunges
instructions: Set the height of the pins in a squat rack so that the barbell can lay across your shoulders comfortably. Next, set the safety bars at the desired height (typically waist high) so that if you fail on a rep, they will take the weight and you will be safe. Load up the barbell with the correct amount of weight on it and you are now ready to go.
Step underneath the bar so that it is resting on your shoulders. Take hold of the bar and step back from the rack maintaining a straight back throughout.This will be your starting position.

Inahle and take a slightly exaggerated step forwardand plant your foot firmly on the floor. Whilst maintaining a stragiht back descend your torso towards the floor by bending both knees into a 90 degree position. Tip: Keep your weight central and drop directly downward rather than forward or back, your knees should be at right angles when at the bottom of the movement.
After a brief pause press through your front thigh and heel to push your body back along the same path into the starting position.
Alternate in this fashion and repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: If you have any balance issues, you should use an alternative method of adding weight to this exercise. For example, use dumbbells.
Variations: Alternating Dumbbell Lunges or Dumbbell Walking Lunges.

Next, set the safety barras at the desired height (typically waist high) so that if you fail on a rep, they will take the peso and you will be safe. Load up the barrara with the correct amount of peso on it and you are now ready to go.
Step underneath the barra so that it is resting on your hombros. Take hold of the barra and step espalda from the rack maintaining a straight espalda throughout.Esta será la posición inicial.

Inahle and take a slightly exaggerated step forwardand plant your pie firmly on the suelo. Whilst maintaining a stragiht espalda descend your torso hacia the suelo by bending both rodillas into a 90 degree posición. Consejo: Mantén your peso central and drop directly downward rather than forward or espalda, your rodillas should be at right angles when at the bottom of the movimiento.
Tras una breve pausa press through your front thigh and talón to push your body espalda along the same path into the posición inicial.
Alternate in this fashion and repeat the movimiento for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Precaución: If you have any balance issues, you should use an alternative method of adding peso to this exercise. For example, use mancuernas.
Variaciones: Alternating mancuerna Lunges or mancuerna Walking Lunges.

name: Sumo Deadlifts
instructions: Load up a barbell and stand behind it with a wide stance. Your shins should be gently touching the bar.

Whilst maintaining good posture (a straight back), bend at your knees and hips to lower your torso enabling you to take a narrow (index finger 6-12 inches apart), overhand grip between your legs. Your hips should be higher than your knees at this point. This will be the starting position. Tip: You can adopt an alternate grip (one overhand and one underhand) if it is more comfortable for you.

Grip the bar and initiate the movement by pressing through your heels and quads whilst simultaneously use the muscles in your back to bring your torso into a vertical position. Throughout the movement keep the bar close to your body, maintain strict form (straight back) and exhale. Once you are in a standing position you should push your chest out by pulling your shoulder blades together.
After a brief pause, descend the barbell back along the same path and inhale until you are back in the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Be very careful when performing this exercise and if you suffer from any back pain, this may not be suitable movement for you.
Variation: Rack Pulls or Plie Dumbbell Squats.

Grip the barra and initiate the movimiento by pressing through your talones and cuádriceps mientras simultaneously use the muscles in your espalda to bring your torso into a vertical posición. Throughout the movimiento keep the barra close to your body, maintain strict form (straight espalda) and espira. Once you are in a standing posición you should push your pecho out by pulling your hombro blades together.
Tras una breve pausa, descend the barrara espalda along the same path and inspira until you are espalda in the posición inicial.

Precaución: Be very careful when performing this exercise and if you suffer from any espalda pain, this may not be suitable movimiento for you.

name: Standing Barbell Shoulder Press
instructions: Grab a barbell and adopt a shoulder width, over hand grip. Lift the bar above your head so that it is directly above your shoulders. Keep your elbows locked at this point for safety. Maintain a straight back throughout this movement. This will be your starting position.
Whilst inhaling, start to lower the bar by bending at your elbows until the bar is below your chin.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the bar back into the starting position by contracting your deltoid muscles (shoulders).
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Those with back problems, may find a seated version more comfortable.
Variations: Dumbbell Shoulder Press or Smith Machine Shoulder Press.

Whilst inhaling, start to lower the barra by bending at your codos until the barra is below your chin.
Tras una breve pausa, espira and press the barra espalda into the posición inicial by contracting your deltoid muscles (hombros).

name: Skull Crushers (Behind The Head)
instructions: Grab a barbell and lay flat on a bench with the bar pressed straight up towards the ceiling. Adopt a pronated (overhand) grip with your elbows tucked in. This will be your starting position.

Inhale as you descend the barbell down towards the back of your head. Be sure to keep your elbows tucked in and stretch your triceps as you go. When you get to within an inch of the bench pause for a second.
Then whilst exhaling, use your triceps to return the bar along the same path to the starting position. Your arms should be fully extended once again and pointing towards the ceiling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Skull Crusher or Tricep Rope Extensions.

es: Coge a barrara and lay flat on a banco with the barra pressed straight up hacia the techo. Adopt a pronated (overmano) grip with your codos tucked in. Esta será la posición inicial.

Inspira as you descend the barrara down hacia the espalda of your cabeza. Be sure to keep your codos tucked in and stretch your tríceps as you go. When you get to within an inch of the banco pause for a second.
Then mientras exhaling, use your tríceps to return the barra along the same path to the posición inicial. Your brazos should be fully extended once again and pointing hacia the techo.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: mancuerna Skull Crusher or Tricep Rope Extensions.

name: Barbell Bulgarian Split Squat
instructions: Place a barbell on the back of your shoulders and position yourself so that one foot is flat on the floor and the other is behind you, at knee height supported by a bench (an exaggerated step's distance away). This will be your starting position.

From here, start to descend by bending at your knees (maintaining good posture) until you create a 90 degree angle at your front knee. As you descend you should be inhaling and ensuring that your front knee does not extend past your toes.
Pause for a brief moment at the bottom of the movement, before exhaling and driving up through your front heel and thigh, until you return to your starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Split Squats or TRX Split Squats.

From here, start to descend by bending at your rodillas (maintaining good posture) until you create a 90 degree angle at your front rodilla. As you descend you should be inhaling and ensuring that your front rodilla does not extend past your toes.
Pause for a brief moment at the bottom of the movimiento, before exhaling and driving up through your front talón and thigh, until you return to your posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: mancuerna Split Squats or TRX Split Squats.

name: Narrow Grip Bench Press
instructions: Lay flat on a bench with a barbell in the rack above you. Take a close grip (6-12 inches between your index fingers) and lift the bar off the rack so that it is directly above your chest. Keep your elbows locked at this point for safety. This will be your starting position.

Whilst inhaling, start to lower the bar by bending at your elbows until the bar gently touches the middle of your chest. Your elbows should remain close together and should brush along the sides of your torso as you go.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the bar back along the same path into the starting position by contracting your triceps and pectoral muscles.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar back in the rack.
Caution: You should always have a spotter when attempting this movement. If a spotter is not available you should be conservative with the weight you are using.
Variation: Smith Machine Close Grip Bench Press.

name: Incline Bicep Curls
instructions: Hold a dumbbell in each hand and lie back on an incline bench.
The dumbbells should be at arm's length hanging at your sides and your palms should be facing out.  This will be your starting position.

Now as you exhale curl the weight outward and up while keeping your forearms in line with your side deltoids. Continue the curl until the dumbbells are at shoulder height and to the sides of your deltoids. Tip: The end of the movement should look similar to a double biceps pose.
After a second contraction at the top of the movement, start to inhale and slowly lower the weights back to the starting position using the same path used to bring them up.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: You can also perform this exercise with cables or exercise bands.

Now as you espira curl the peso outward and up while keeping your forebrazos in line with your side deltoids. Continue the curl until the mancuernas are at hombro height and to the sides of your deltoids. Consejo: The end of the movimiento should look similar to a double bíceps pose.
After a second contraction at the top of the movimiento, start to inspira and slowly lower the pesos espalda to the posición inicial using the same path used to bring them up.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: You can also perform this exercise with poleas or exercise bandas.

name: Incline Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Lay on an incline bench (between 30-45%) with a barbell in the rack above you. Take a medium grip (a grip which creates a 90 degree angle at your elbows half way through the movement) and lift the bar off the rack so that it is directly above your chest. Keep your elbows locked at this point for safety. This will be your starting position.
Whilst inhaling, start to lower the bar by bending at your elbows until the bar gently touches the top of your chest.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the bar back into the starting position by contracting your pectoral muscles.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar back in the rack.
Caution: You should always have a spotter when attempting this movement. If a spotter is not available you should be conservative with the weight you are using.
Variations: Smith Machine Incline Bench Press or Incline Dumbbell Chest Press.

name: Barbell Good Mornings
instructions: Set the height of the pins in a squat rack so that the barbell can lay across your shoulders comfortably. Next, set the safety bars at the desired height (typically waist high) so that if you fail on a rep, they will take the weight and you will be safe. Load up the barbell with the correct amount of weight on it and you are now ready to go.

Step underneath the bar and take the weight across your shoulders. Maintain a straight back and a small bend at your knees when unracking the bar. Press through your legs to lift the bar up and take a small step backwards into the middle of the rack.
Adopt a shoulder width stance, maintain a straight back throughout and keep your head up. This will be your starting position.

Inhale and begin to lean forward from your waist. Push your hips and glutes backward as you do so until your torso is just off being parallel to the floor. Your hamstrings should be under tension at this point.

After a brief pause, exhale and return the barbell to the starting position along the same path, thrusting your hips forward, squeezing your glutes as you do so. Stand to attention with your legs fully extended, back straight and shoulders relaxed. (Remember to keep your back straight throughout the whole movement).
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: If you suffer from any back injuries, this may not be the most suitable exercise for you.
Variations: Barbell Hip Thrusts or Stiff Leg Dumbbell Deadlifts.

name: Barbell Front Squats Clean Grip
instructions: To begin, first set the bar in a rack slightly below shoulder level.  Rest the bar on top of the deltoids, pushing into the clavicles,  and lightly touching the throat. Your hands should be in a clean grip, touching the bar only with your fingers to help keep it in position.

Lift the bar off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.  Step away from the rack and position your legs using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out.  Keep your head and elbows up at all times. This will be your starting position.

Bend at the knees, sitting down between your legs.  Continue down until your hamstrings are on your calves. Keep your knees aligned with your feet by consciously using your abductors to push your knees out as you squat.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor mainly with the heel or middle of your foot as you straighten the legs again and return to the starting position.

name: Barbell Floor Press
instructions: Adjust the j-hooks so they are at the appropriate height to rack the bar. Begin lying on the floor with your head near the end of a power rack. Keeping your shoulder blades pulled together; pull the bar off of the hooks.

Lower the bar towards the bottom of your chest or upper stomach, squeezing the bar and attempting to pull it apart as you do so. Ensure that you tuck your elbows throughout the movement. Lower the bar until your upper arm contacts the ground and pause, preventing any slamming or bouncing of the weight.
Press the bar back up as fast as you can, keeping the bar, your wrists, and elbows in line as you do so.

es: Ajusta los ganchos en J para que estén a la altura adecuada para colocar la barra. Empieza tumbándote en el suelo con la cabeza cerca del final de un rack de potencia. Manteniendo los omóplatos juntos; Saca la barra de los ganchos.

Baja la barra hacia la parte inferior de tu pecho o la parte superior del abdomen, apretando la barra e intentando separarla mientras lo haces. Asegúrate de doblar los codos durante todo el movimiento. Baja la barra hasta que la parte superior de tu brazo entre en contacto con el suelo y haga una pausa, evitando cualquier golpe o rebote del peso.
Empuja la barra hacia arriba lo más rápido que puedas, manteniendo la barra, las muñecas y los codos alineados mientras lo haces.

name: Narrow Grip EZ Bar Skullcrushers
instructions: Grab an EZ bar (overhand grip) and lay flat on a bench with the bar pressed straight up towards the ceiling. Keep your elbows as close together as you can to initiate maximum tricep activity. This will be your starting position.
Inhale as you descend the bar towards your forehead. Be sure to keep your upper arms stationary and your elbows tucked in. When you get to within an inch of your forehead pause for a second.
Then whilst exhaling, use your triceps to return the bar to the starting position. Your arms should be fully extended once again and pointing towards the ceiling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Narrow Grip Barbell Bench Press or Tricep Rope Extensions.

Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Narrow Grip Barbell Bench Press or Tricep Rope Extensions.
es: Agarra una barra EZ (agarre prono) y recuéstese sobre un banco con la barra extendida hacia el techo. Mantén los codos lo más juntos posible para iniciar la máxima actividad de los tríceps. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Inhala mientras desciendes la barra hacia tu frente. Asegúrate de mantener la parte superior de los brazos inmóviles y los codos pegados al cuerpo. Cuando llegue a unos 2-3 cm de su frente, haga una pausa por un segundo.
Luego, mientras exhalas, usa tus tríceps para devolver la barra a la posición inicial. Tus brazos deben estar completamente extendidos una vez más y apuntando hacia el techo.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press de banca con barra con agarre estrecho o extensiones de cuerda para tríceps.

name: Decline Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Lay on a decline bench with a barbell in the rack above you. Take a medium grip (a grip which creates a 90 degree angle at your elbows half way through the movement) and lift the bar off the rack so that it is directly above your chest. Keep your elbows locked at this point for safety. This will be your starting position.
Whilst inhaling, start to lower the bar by bending at your elbows until the bar gently touches your lower chest.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the bar back into the starting position by contracting your pectoral muscles.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar back in the rack.
Caution: You should always have a spotter when attempting this movement. If a spotter is not available you should be conservative with the weight you are using.
Variations: Smith Machine Decline Press or Decline Dumbbell Chest Press.

Take a medium grip (a grip which creates a 90 degree angle at your elbows half way through the movement) and lift the bar off the rack so that it is directly above your chest. Keep your elbows locked at this point for safety. This will be your starting position.
Whilst inhaling, start to lower the bar by bending at your elbows until the bar gently touches your lower chest.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the bar back into the starting position by contracting your pectoral muscles.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar back in the rack.
Caution: You should always have a spotter when attempting this movement. If a spotter is not available you should be conservative with the weight you are using.
Variations: Smith Machine Decline Press or Decline Dumbbell Chest Press.
es: Recuéstese en un banco declinado con una barra en el rack encima de ti. Coge un agarre medio (un agarre que crea un ángulo de 90 grados en los codos a la mitad del movimiento) y levante la barra del rack para que quede directamente encima de tu pecho. Mantén los codos bloqueados en este punto por seguridad. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Mientras inhala, comience a bajar la barra doblando los codos hasta que la barra toque suavemente la parte inferior del pecho.
Después de una breve pausa, exhala y presiona la barra hacia la posición inicial contrayendo los músculos pectorales.
Repite el movimiento durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Cuando haya terminado, coloque la barra nuevamente en el rack.
Precaución: siempre debe tener un observador cuando intente este movimiento. Si no hay un observador disponible, debe ser conservador con el peso que está utilizando.
Variaciones: Press declinado con máquina Smith o Press de pecho declinado con mancuernas.

name: Biceps Curl
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a shoulder width stance with your arms hanging perpendicular to the floor, by your sides.This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, exhale and curl the dumbbells both up and outward whilst rotating your palms to face the ceiling.
Continue on an upward motion until your biceps are optimally contracted.
After this, inhale and return the dumbbells along the same path back to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Standing Concentration Curls or Concentration Curls.

en: biceps
es: bíceps

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a shoulder width stance with your arms hanging perpendicular to the floor, by your sides.This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, exhale and curl the dumbbells both up and outward whilst rotating your palms to face the ceiling.
Continue on an upward motion until your biceps are optimally contracted.
After this, inhale and return the dumbbells along the same path back to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Standing Concentration Curls or Concentration Curls.
es: Agarra una mancuerna en cada mano y adopta una postura a la altura de los hombros con los brazos colgando perpendiculares al suelo, a los lados. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Para iniciar el movimiento, exhale y doble las mancuernas hacia arriba y hacia afuera mientras gira las palmas de las manos hacia el techo.
Continúa con un movimiento ascendente hasta que sus bíceps estén óptimamente contraídos.
Después de esto, inhala y regresa las mancuernas por el mismo camino a su posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Curls de concentración de pie o Curls de concentración.

name: Barbell Walking Lunges
instructions: Grab and place a barbell across the back of your shoulders. Stand with a straight back, hands placed on the bar for stability in a shoulder width stance. This will be your starting position. Tip: Maintain a straight back throughout.

Take a step forward (slightly larger than a normal step) and as you land, drop your body down so that you create two right angles at your knees. Inhale as you do so whilst maintaining a straight torso.
Make sure that you keep your front knee over your heel and not over your toes. Your front shin should now be perpendicular to the floor.
As you exhale, push off the floor with your rear foot to return your body into a standing position.
Alternate legs as you go (as you walk forwards) and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Bodyweight Walking Lunges or Dumbbell Walking Lunges.

en: Grab and place a barbell across the back of your shoulders. Stand with a straight back, hands placed on the bar for stability in a shoulder width stance. This will be your starting position. Tip: Maintain a straight back throughout.

Take a step forward (slightly larger than a normal step) and as you land, drop your body down so that you create two right angles at your knees. Inhale as you do so whilst maintaining a straight torso.
Make sure that you keep your front knee over your heel and not over your toes. Your front shin should now be perpendicular to the floor.
As you exhale, push off the floor with your rear foot to return your body into a standing position.
Alternate legs as you go (as you walk forwards) and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Bodyweight Walking Lunges or Dumbbell Walking Lunges.
es: Agarra y coloque una barra en la parte posterior de sus hombros. Párese con la espalda recta y las manos colocadas en la barra para mayor estabilidad en una postura a la altura de los hombros. Esta será tu posición inicial. Consejo: mantenga la espalda recta en todo momento.

Da un paso hacia adelante (un poco más grande que un paso normal) y, cuando aterrices, deja caer el cuerpo para crear dos ángulos rectos en las rodillas. Inhala mientras lo haces manteniendo el torso recto.
Asegúrate de mantener la rodilla delantera sobre el talón y no sobre los dedos de los pies. Tu espinilla delantera ahora debería estar perpendicular al suelo.
Mientras exhala, empuje el suelo con el pie trasero para que el cuerpo vuelva a la posición de pie.
Alterne las piernas durante el movimiento (mientras camina hacia adelante) y repita hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: estocadas caminando con peso corporal o estocadas caminando con mancuernas.

name: Barbell Stiff Legged Deadlifts
instructions: Grab a loaded barbell and adopt a standing position with your feet shoulder width apart. Have your arms in front of you but still perpendicular to the floor (overhand grip, palms facing behind you). Slightly bend at your knees and maintain a straight back throughout. This will be your starting position.

Whilst keeping your knees stationary, inhale as you lean forwards from your waist (remember to keep a straight back), keeping the barbell close to you as you go. Keep lowering the barbell towards your feet until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings.

After a brief pause bring your torso upright again by pushing your hips forward. Tip: Remember, this whole movement is performed with 'stiff' legs (slight bend at the knee, but no more) and a straight back throughout. Exhale as you perform this part of the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This is not an exercise for those with back issues. Avoid jerking motions as this could cause serious injury.
Variation: Dumbbell Stiff Legged Deadlift or Good Mornings.

en: hamstrings

en: Grab a loaded barbell and adopt a standing position with your feet shoulder width apart. Have your arms in front of you but still perpendicular to the floor (overhand grip, palms facing behind you). Slightly bend at your knees and maintain a straight back throughout. This will be your starting position.

Whilst keeping your knees stationary, inhale as you lean forwards from your waist (remember to keep a straight back), keeping the barbell close to you as you go. Keep lowering the barbell towards your feet until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings.

After a brief pause bring your torso upright again by pushing your hips forward. Tip: Remember, this whole movement is performed with 'stiff' legs (slight bend at the knee, but no more) and a straight back throughout. Exhale as you perform this part of the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This is not an exercise for those with back issues. Avoid jerking motions as this could cause serious injury.
Variation: Dumbbell Stiff Legged Deadlift or Good Mornings.
es: Coge una barra cargada y adopta una posición de pie con los pies separados a la altura de los hombros. Mantén los brazos frente a ti pero aún perpendiculares al suelo (agarre prono, con las palmas hacia atrás). Doble ligeramente las rodillas y mantenga la espalda recta en todo momento. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras mantienes las rodillas quietas, inhala mientras te inclinas hacia adelante desde la cintura (recuerda mantener la espalda recta), manteniendo la barra cerca del cuerpo durante el movimiento. Sigue bajando la barra hacia tus pies hasta que sientas un estiramiento en los isquiosurales.

Después de una breve pausa, vuelva a enderezar el torso empujando las caderas hacia adelante. Consejo: Recuerde, todo este movimiento se realiza con las piernas "rígidas" (ligeramente doblada en la rodilla, pero no más) y la espalda recta en todo momento. Exhala mientras realizas esta parte del movimiento.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Precaución: este no es un ejercicio para personas con problemas de espalda. Evite movimientos bruscos ya que esto podría causar lesiones graves.
Variación: Peso muerto con piernas rígidas con mancuernas o Buenos días.

name: Seated Shoulder Press (Barbell)
instructions: Grab a barbell with a wider than shoulder width overhand grip. Take a seat on a bench that has it's back rest in a 'just off vertical' position and make sure that your back is supported. Lift the barbell above your head towards the ceiling so that your elbows are locked out and your palms are facing forward. This is your starting position.
Inhale and slowly lower the barbell down to your shoulders (infront of your head). Pause for a brief moment when the bar gently touches your shoulders.
Exhale and press the barbell back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Smith Machine Military Press or Standing Military Press.

en: Grab a barbell with a wider than shoulder width overhand grip. Take a seat on a bench that has it's back rest in a 'just off vertical' position and make sure that your back is supported. Lift the barbell above your head towards the ceiling so that your elbows are locked out and your palms are facing forward. This is your starting position.
Inhale and slowly lower the barbell down to your shoulders (infront of your head). Pause for a brief moment when the bar gently touches your shoulders.
Exhale and press the barbell back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Smith Machine Military Press or Standing Military Press.
es: Agarra una barra con un agarre por encima del ancho de los hombros. Coge asiento en un banco que tenga el respaldo en una posición "justo fuera de la vertical" y asegúrate de que su espalda esté apoyada. Levante la barra por encima de su cabeza hacia el techo de modo que sus codos queden bloqueados y sus palmas miren hacia adelante. Esta es tu posición inicial.
Inhala y baja lentamente la barra hasta los hombros (frente a tu cabeza). Haz una pausa por un breve momento cuando la barra toque suavemente sus hombros.
Exhala y presiona la barra hacia atrás por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press militar con máquina Smith o Press militar de pie.

name: Bent Over Barbell Rows
instructions: Load up a barbell with the desired amount of weight and place it on the floor in front of you. Take hold of it with a wider than shoulder width, overhand grip by bending at your knees and waist (more so at your waist) whilst maintaining a straight back. Your arms should be hanging perpendicular to the floor at this point. This is your starting position.
Exhale and squeeze the muscles in your back to bring the barbell in towards your torso. Bend at the elbow to allow the movement but try not to take any weight through your forearms/ biceps.
Once the barbell is as close to your body as it can be or the muscles in your back are at tight as they can be, inhale and return the barbell along the same path back into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This exercise may not be suitable for people that suffer from any back pain/injuries.
Variations: Bent Over Row (Reverse Grip) or Single Arm Leverage Iso Row Machine.

Take hold of it with a wider than shoulder width, overhand grip by bending at your knees and waist (more so at your waist) whilst maintaining a straight back. Your arms should be hanging perpendicular to the floor at this point. This is your starting position.
Exhale and squeeze the muscles in your back to bring the barbell in towards your torso. Bend at the elbow to allow the movement but try not to take any weight through your forearms/ biceps.
Once the barbell is as close to your body as it can be or the muscles in your back are at tight as they can be, inhale and return the barbell along the same path back into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This exercise may not be suitable for people that suffer from any back pain/injuries.
Variations: Bent Over Row (Reverse Grip) or Single Arm Leverage Iso Row Machine.
es: Carga una barra con la cantidad de peso deseada y colócala en el suelo frente a ti. Sujételo con un agarre más ancho que el ancho de los hombros, doblando las rodillas y la cintura (más aún en la cintura) mientras mantiene la espalda recta. En este punto, tus brazos deben colgar perpendiculares al suelo. Esta es tu posición inicial.
Exhala y aprieta los músculos de la espalda para acercar la barra hacia el torso. Doble el codo para permitir el movimiento, pero trate de no pasar ningún peso por los antebrazos o bíceps.
Una vez que la barra esté lo más cerca posible de tu cuerpo o que los músculos de su espalda estén lo más tensos posible, inhale y regrese la barra por el mismo camino a la posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Precaución: Este ejercicio puede no ser adecuado para personas que sufren algún dolor o lesión en la espalda.
Variaciones: remo inclinado (agarre inverso) o máquina de remo iso con palanca de un solo brazo.

name: Barbell Lunges
instructions: Set the height of the pins in a squat rack so that the barbell can lay across your shoulders comfortably. Next, set the safety bars at the desired height (typically waist high) so that if you fail on a rep, they will take the weight and you will be safe. Load up the barbell with the correct amount of weight on it and you are now ready to go.
Step underneath the bar so that it is resting on your shoulders. Take hold of the bar and step back from the rack maintaining a straight back throughout.This will be your starting position.

Inahle and take a slightly exaggerated step forwardand plant your foot firmly on the floor. Whilst maintaining a stragiht back descend your torso towards the floor by bending both knees into a 90 degree position. Tip: Keep your weight central and drop directly downward rather than forward or back, your knees should be at right angles when at the bottom of the movement.
After a brief pause press through your front thigh and heel to push your body back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: If you have any balance issues, you should use an alternative method of adding weight to this exercise. For example, use dumbbells.
Variations: Dumbbell Lunges or Dumbbell Walking Lunges.

Load up the barbell with the correct amount of weight on it and you are now ready to go.

Inahle and take a slightly exaggerated step forwardand plant your foot firmly on the floor. Whilst maintaining a stragiht back descend your torso towards the floor by bending both knees into a 90 degree position. Tip: Keep your weight central and drop directly downward rather than forward or back, your knees should be at right angles when at the bottom of the movement.
After a brief pause press through your front thigh and heel to push your body back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: If you have any balance issues, you should use an alternative method of adding weight to this exercise. For example, use dumbbells.
Variations: Dumbbell Lunges or Dumbbell Walking Lunges.
es: Establezca la altura de los soportes en un rack de sentadillas de modo que la barra pueda descansar cómodamente sobre sus hombros. Luego, coloque los seguros a la altura deseada (generalmente a la altura de la cintura) para que, si falla en una repetición, soporten el peso y estés seguro. Cargue la barra con la cantidad correcta de peso y ya estará listo para comenzar.
Pase por debajo de la barra para que descanse sobre sus hombros. Sujeta la barra y retroceda del rack manteniendo la espalda recta en todo momento. Esta será su posición inicial.

Inhale y dé un paso ligeramente exagerado hacia adelante y plante el pie firmemente en el suelo. Mientras mantiene la espalda recta, descienda el torso hacia el suelo doblando ambas rodillas en una posición de 90 grados. Consejo: Mantén su peso central y caiga directamente hacia abajo en lugar de hacia adelante o hacia atrás; sus rodillas deben estar en ángulo recto cuando esté en la parte inferior del movimiento.
Después de una breve pausa, presione la parte delantera del muslo y el talón para empujar el cuerpo hacia atrás por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial.
Repite el movimiento durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Precaución: si tiene algún problema de equilibrio, debe utilizar un método alternativo para agregar peso a este ejercicio. Por ejemplo, utiliza mancuernas.
Variaciones: estocadas con mancuernas o estocadas caminando con mancuernas.

name: Barbell Hip Thrust
instructions: Load up a barbell with your desired amount of weight and set it on the floor. Take a seat on the floor with your legs underneath the bar, your back should be supported by a bench or an elevated step with your shoulder blades being the point of contact.
Roll the bar up and over your legs until it is directly above your hips, bend at your knees and walk your feet in towards your glutes.

Whilst exhaling, squeeze your glutes and drive your heels to lift your hips towards the ceiling. As you do so, lean back over the back support and keep driving upward until your glutes are fully contracted and your body is parallel with the floor.
Inhale and gently relax your glutes to return the barbell back along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Barbell Glute Bridge.

en: Load up a barbell with your desired amount of weight and set it on the floor. Take a seat on the floor with your legs underneath the bar, your back should be supported by a bench or an elevated step with your shoulder blades being the point of contact.
Roll the bar up and over your legs until it is directly above your hips, bend at your knees and walk your feet in towards your glutes.

Whilst exhaling, squeeze your glutes and drive your heels to lift your hips towards the ceiling. As you do so, lean back over the back support and keep driving upward until your glutes are fully contracted and your body is parallel with the floor.
Inhale and gently relax your glutes to return the barbell back along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Barbell Glute Bridge.
es: Cargue una barra con la cantidad de peso deseada y colóquela en el suelo. Siéntate en el suelo con las piernas debajo de la barra, tu espalda debe estar apoyada en un banco o un escalón elevado con los omóplatos como punto de contacto.
Enrolle la barra hacia arriba y sobre sus piernas hasta que esté directamente encima de sus caderas, doble las rodillas y camine con los pies hacia los glúteos.

Mientras exhalas, aprieta los glúteos y empuja los talones para levantar las caderas hacia el techo. Mientras lo hace, inclínese hacia atrás sobre el respaldo y siga avanzando hacia arriba hasta que sus glúteos estén completamente contraídos y tu cuerpo quede paralelo al suelo.
Inhala y relaja suavemente los glúteos para devolver la barra por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variación: Puente de glúteos con barra.

name: Barbell Glute Bridge
instructions: Take a seat on the floor with a loaded barbell above your hips. Tip: To minimise your discomfort, place a pad over the bar. Once all is in place, gently place your hands (just wider than shoulder width) on top of the bar and lay down flat on your back. Next, you will need to bend your knees so that the are at a 90 degree angle with your heels firmly planted on the floor. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale, apply pressure into the floor through your upper back/shoulders and drive your hips towards the ceiling. To do so, squeeze your glutes and direct force through your heels. Tip: Stabilise the bar with your overhand grip but take no pressure.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the barbell back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Hip Thrusts or Stability Ball Hip Bridge.

es: Siéntate en el suelo con una barra cargada sobre tus caderas. Consejo: Para minimizar las molestias, coloque una almohadilla sobre la barra. Una vez que todo esté en su lugar, coloque suavemente las manos (un poco más anchas que el ancho de los hombros) encima de la barra y acuéstese boca arriba. A continuación, deberá doblar las rodillas para que formen un ángulo de 90 grados con los talones firmemente plantados en el suelo. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhale, aplique presión en el suelo a través de la parte superior de la espalda/hombros y lleve las caderas hacia el techo. Para hacerlo, aprieta los glúteos y dirige la fuerza a través de los talones. Consejo: Estabilice la barra con el agarre prono pero sin ejercer presión.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa la barra por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Empujes de cadera o puente de cadera con bola de estabilidad.

name: Barbell Squats
instructions: Set the height of the pins in a squat rack so that the barbell can lay across your shoulders comfortably. Next, set the safety bars at the desired height (typically waist high) so that if you fail on a rep, they will take the weight and you will be safe. Load up the barbell with the correct amount of weight on it and you are now ready to go.

Step underneath the bar and take the weight across your shoulders whilst maintaining a straight back and a small bend at your knees. Press through your legs to lift the bar and take a small step backwards into the middle of the rack.
Adopt a shoulder width stance with your toes slightly pointing outward. Maintain a straight back throughout the movement and keep your head up. This will be your starting position.

Inhale and begin to descend by bending at your knees and hips. Your weight should be put predominantly through your heels as you sit back into the movement until your thighs are either parallel or just past to the floor.

After a brief pause, exhale and return the bar to the starting position along the same path, push through your heels with the force being driven through your quads and glutes to do so. Stand to attention with your legs fully extended, back straight and shoulders relaxed.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This is a very complex movement and will require a spotter. If you do not have a spotter, be cautious with your weights. If you suffer from back issues, this exercise may not be suitable.
Variations: Dumbbell Squats or Kettlebell Squats

Variations: Dumbbell Squats or Kettlebell Squats
es: Establezca la altura de los soportes en un rack de sentadillas de modo que la barra pueda descansar cómodamente sobre sus hombros. Luego, coloque los seguros a la altura deseada (generalmente a la altura de la cintura) para que, si falla en una repetición, soporten el peso y estés seguro. Cargue la barra con la cantidad correcta de peso y ya estará listo para comenzar.

Párate debajo de la barra y toma el peso sobre tus hombros mientras mantienes la espalda recta y una pequeña flexión en las rodillas. Empuja con las piernas para levantar la barra y dé un pequeño paso hacia atrás hasta el centro de el rack.

Adopte una postura a la altura de los hombros con los dedos de los pies ligeramente apuntando hacia afuera. Mantén la espalda recta durante todo el movimiento y mantenga la cabeza erguida. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Inhala y comienza a descender doblando las rodillas y las caderas. Su peso debe colocarse predominantemente a través de los talones mientras se sienta hacia atrás en el movimiento hasta que sus muslos estén paralelos o apenas pasados ​​​​del suelo.

Después de una breve pausa, exhala y regresa la barra a la posición inicial siguiendo el mismo camino, empuja con los talones y la fuerza se transmite a través de los cuádriceps y los glúteos para hacerlo. Párese firme con las piernas completamente extendidas, la espalda recta y los hombros relajados.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.

Precaución: este es un movimiento muy complejo y requerirá un observador. Si no tiene un observador, tenga cuidado con sus pesas. Si sufre problemas de espalda, es posible que este ejercicio no sea adecuado.
Variaciones: sentadillas con mancuernas o sentadillas con pesas rusas

name: Barbell Deadlifts
instructions: Load up a barbell and stand behind it with your shins gently touching the bar.

Whilst maintaining good posture (a straight back), bend at your knees and hips to lower your torso enabling you to take a shoulder width overhand grip. This grip position should be just outside of your knees and your hips should remain higher than your knees. This will be the starting position of the exercise. Tip: You can adopt an alternate grip (one overhand and one underhand) if it is more comfortable for you.

Grip the bar and initiate the movement by pressing through your heels and quads whilst simultaneously use the muscles in your back to bring your torso into a vertical position. Throughout the movement keep the bar close to your body, maintain strict form (straight back) and exhale. Once you are in a standing position you should push your chest out by pulling your shoulder blades together.
After a brief pause, descend the barbell back along the same path and inhale until you are back in the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Be very careful when performing this exercise and if you suffer from any back pain, this may not be suitable movement for you.
Variation: Rack Pulls or Dumbbell Bent Over Rows.

es: Carga una barra y párate detrás de ella con las espinillas tocando suavemente la barra.

Mientras mantiene una buena postura (espalda recta), doble las rodillas y las caderas para bajar el torso, lo que le permitirá realizar un agarre por encima de la altura de los hombros. Esta posición de agarre debe estar justo fuera de las rodillas y las caderas deben permanecer más altas que las rodillas. Esta será la posición inicial del ejercicio. Consejo: Puede adoptar un agarre alternativo (uno por encima y otro por debajo) si le resulta más cómodo.

Agarra la barra e inicie el movimiento presionando los talones y los cuádriceps mientras usa simultáneamente los músculos de la espalda para llevar el torso a una posición vertical. Durante todo el movimiento, mantén la barra cerca de tu cuerpo, mantén la forma estricta (espalda recta) y exhala. Una vez que esté en posición de pie, debe empujar el pecho hacia afuera juntando los omóplatos.
Después de una breve pausa, desciende la barra hacia atrás por el mismo camino e inhala hasta volver a la posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Precaución: Ten mucho cuidado al realizar este ejercicio y si tienes algún dolor de espalda, puede que este no sea un movimiento adecuado para ti.
Variación: Tirones de rack o remo inclinado con mancuernas.

name: Standing Barbell Curls
instructions: Grab a barbell with a shoulder width grip (palms facing forward), and allow your arms the hang perpendicular to the floor. Adopt a standing position with a shoulder width stance and a straight back. Keep your elbows pinned in close to your torso for the duration of the exercise. This will be your starting position.
Whilst keeping your upper arms stationary, curl the barbell upward toward your shoulders by flexing your biceps. Exhale as you do so and remember, only your forearms should move.
Continue in this fashion until your biceps are fully flexed and the barbell is at shoulder height.
Pause for a brief moment and then return the barbell along the same path toward the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Wide Grip EZ Bar Curls or Cable Curls.

es: Agarra una barra con un agarre a la altura de los hombros (con las palmas hacia adelante) y deje que sus brazos cuelguen perpendiculares al suelo. Adopte una posición de pie con una postura a la altura de los hombros y la espalda recta. Mantén los codos inmovilizados cerca del torso durante todo el ejercicio. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Mientras mantiene la parte superior de los brazos inmóviles, doble la barra hacia los hombros flexionando los bíceps. Exhala mientras lo haces y recuerda, sólo tus antebrazos deben moverse.
Continúa de esta manera hasta que sus bíceps estén completamente flexionados y la barra esté a la altura de los hombros.
Haz una pausa por un breve momento y luego regrese la barra por el mismo camino hacia la posición inicial mientras inhala.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Curls con barra EZ de agarre ancho o Curls con cable.

name: Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Lay flat on a bench with a barbell in the rack above you. Take a medium grip (a grip which creates a 90 degree angle at your elbows half way through the movement) and lift the bar off the rack so that it is directly above your chest. Keep your elbows locked at this point for safety. This will be your starting position.
Whilst inhaling, start to lower the bar by bending at your elbows until the bar gently touches the middle of your chest.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the bar back into the starting position by contracting your pectoral muscles.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar back in the rack.
Caution: You should always have a spotter when attempting this movement. If a spotter is not available you should be conservative with the weight you are using.
Variations: Smith Machine Chest Press or Flat Dumbbell Chest Press.

es: Acuéstese en un banco con una barra en el rack encima de ti. Coge un agarre medio (un agarre que crea un ángulo de 90 grados en los codos a la mitad del movimiento) y levante la barra del rack para que quede directamente encima de tu pecho. Mantén los codos bloqueados en este punto por seguridad. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Mientras inhala, comience a bajar la barra doblando los codos hasta que la barra toque suavemente la mitad de tu pecho.
Después de una breve pausa, exhala y presiona la barra hacia la posición inicial contrayendo los músculos pectorales.
Repite el movimiento durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Cuando haya terminado, coloque la barra nuevamente en el rack.
Precaución: siempre debe tener un observador cuando intente este movimiento. Si no hay un observador disponible, debe ser conservador con el peso que está utilizando.
Variaciones: Press de pecho con máquina Smith o Press de pecho plano con mancuernas.

name: Standing Dumbbell Overhead Tricep Extension
instructions: Grab a dumbbell with both hands and adopt a standing shoulder width stance. Create a diamond shape with your hands by connecting your thumbs to each other and your index fingers to one another. The handle of the dumbbell should sit in the diamond shaped gap that you have made. Once you have done this, allow one end of the dumbbell to slide down down that you now have your palms in contact with the rubber/metal end. Press the dumbbell directly above your head with your palms angled towards to the ceiling. This is your starting position. Tip: Your elbows should remain as close together as possible throughout the movement.

To initiate the movement, inhale and control the descent of the dumbbell down behind your head. Bend at your elbows to allow this movement to take place yet keep them as close together as possible. Continue descending until your elbows are at 90 degrees or you can feel a stretch in your triceps.
After a brief pause, exhale and return the dumbbell along the same path back into its starting position by contracting your triceps.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: EZ Bar Skullcrushers or Dumbbell Kickbacks.

name.es: Extensión de tríceps con mancuerna sobre la cabeza de pie

es: Agarra una mancuerna con ambas manos y adopte una postura de pie a la altura de los hombros. Crea una forma de diamante con tus manos conectando tus pulgares entre sí y tus dedos índices entre sí. El mango de la mancuerna debe quedar en el espacio en forma de diamante que has hecho. Una vez que haya hecho esto, permita que un extremo de la mancuerna se deslice hacia abajo hasta que ahora tenga las palmas de las manos en contacto con el extremo de goma/metal. Empuja la mancuerna directamente sobre su cabeza con las palmas de las manos hacia el techo. Esta es tu posición inicial. Consejo: tus codos deben permanecer lo más juntos posible durante todo el movimiento.

Para iniciar el movimiento, inhala y controla el descenso de la mancuerna detrás de tu cabeza. Doble los codos para permitir que se realice este movimiento, pero manténgalos lo más juntos posible. Continúa descendiendo hasta que sus codos estén a 90 grados o pueda sentir un estiramiento en sus tríceps.
Después de una breve pausa, exhala y regresa la mancuerna por el mismo camino a su posición inicial contrayendo los tríceps.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: barra EZ Skullcrushers o Dumbbell Kickbacks.

name: Standing Alternate Hammer Curls
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a standing position with your elbows tucked in, palms facing your torso. This will be your starting position.

Whilst maintaining a stationary upper arm, curl the left dumbbell up towards your shoulder by contracting your bicep. Keep your elbow pinned to your side and exhale as you do so. Squeeze your bicep for a brief moment at the contracted position. Tip: Only the forearm should have moved.
After this brief pause, inhale and return the dumbbell to the starting posiiton along the same path.
Repeat the movement with your right hand.
Continue alternating for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Hammer Curls or Seated Dumbbell Curls.

es: Agarra una mancuerna en cada mano y adopte una posición de pie con los codos pegados al cuerpo y las palmas hacia el torso. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras mantiene la parte superior del brazo inmóvil, doble la mancuerna izquierda hacia el hombro contrayendo el bíceps. Mantén el codo pegado a su costado y exhale mientras lo haces. Aprieta tu bíceps por un breve momento en la posición contraída. Consejo: Sólo debería haberse movido el antebrazo.
Después de esta breve pausa, inhala y regresa la mancuerna a la posición inicial por el mismo camino.
Repite el movimiento con tu mano derecha.
Continúa alternando durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Curl de martillo sentado o Curl de mancuerna sentado.

name: Lying Dumbbell Tricep Extension
instructions: Grab two dumbbells and lay flat on a bench with the dumbbells pressed straight up towards the ceiling. Adopt a pronated grip (palms facing away from you), with the ends of the dumbbells gently touching one another and your elbows tucked in. This will be your starting position.

Inhale as you descend the dumbbells down towards your forehead. Be sure to keep your upper arms stationary and your elbows tucked in. When you get to within an inch of your forehead pause for a second.
Then whilst exhaling, use your triceps to return the dumbbells along the same path to the starting position. Your arms should be fully extended once again and pointing towards the ceiling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: EZ-Bar Skullcrushers or Tricep Rope Extensions.

es: Coge dos mancuernas y recuéstese en un banco con las mancuernas extendidas hacia el techo. Adopte un agarre en pronación (con las palmas hacia afuera), con los extremos de las mancuernas tocándose suavemente y los codos pegados al cuerpo. Esta será su posición inicial.

Inhala mientras bajas las mancuernas hacia tu frente. Asegúrate de mantener la parte superior de los brazos inmóviles y los codos pegados al cuerpo. Cuando llegue a unos 2-3 cm de su frente, haga una pausa por un segundo.

Luego, mientras exhala, use sus tríceps para regresar las mancuernas por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial. Tus brazos deben estar completamente extendidos una vez más y apuntando hacia el techo.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: barra EZ Skullcrushers o extensiones de cuerda para tríceps.

name: Incline Hammer Curls
instructions: Grab two dumbbells and take a seat on an incline bench (around 45 degrees) with your arms by your side.
The palms of your hands should be facing your torso. This will be your starting position.

Whilst holding the upper arm stationary, exhale as you curl both dumbbells forward, contracting your biceps. Continue the movement until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze your biceps.
(Tip: Only the forearms should move.)
Inhale as you slowly begin to bring the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Standing Hammer Curls or Cable Curls.

es: Coge dos mancuernas y siéntate en un banco inclinado (alrededor de 45 grados) con los brazos a los lados.
Las palmas de tus manos deben mirar hacia tu torso. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras mantienes inmóvil la parte superior del brazo, exhala mientras flexionas ambas mancuernas hacia adelante, contrayendo los bíceps. Continúa el movimiento hasta que tus bíceps estén completamente contraídos y las mancuernas a la altura de los hombros. Mantén la posición contraída por un segundo mientras aprietas los bíceps.
(Consejo: sólo deben moverse los antebrazos).
Inhale mientras comienza lentamente a bajar las mancuernas a la posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Curl de martillo de pie o Curl de cable.

name: Incline Dumbbell Chest Press
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay down on an incline bench (around 30 degrees), bringing the dumbbells beside your chest. Keep your elbows at a 90-degree angle and your forearms perpendicular to the floor. Once here, keep your palms facing away from you, exhale and press the dumbbells towards the ceiling.
Squeeze your pectoral muscles when your arms are at full extension. Once you have completed this, inhale and bring your arms back down beside your chest until your elbows are at 90-degrees once more.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Always have a spotter with you to help you throughout the movement and to help unload the dumbbells after completion.
Variations: Incline Barbell Bench Press or Smith Machine Incline Bench Press

es: Toma una mancuerna en cada mano y recuéstate en un banco inclinado (alrededor de 30 grados), colocando las mancuernas al lado de tu pecho. Mantén los codos en un ángulo de 90 grados y los antebrazos perpendiculares al suelo. Una vez aquí, mantén las palmas de las manos alejadas de ti, exhala y presiona las mancuernas hacia el techo.

Apriete los músculos pectorales cuando los brazos estén completamente extendidos. Una vez que haya completado esto, inhale y baje los brazos al lado del pecho hasta que los codos estén a 90 grados una vez más.
Repite el movimiento durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Precaución: siempre tenga un observador contigo para ayudarte durante todo el movimiento y para ayudar a descargar las mancuernas una vez finalizado.
Variaciones: Press de banca inclinado con barra o Press de banca inclinado con máquina Smith

name: Incline Dumbbell Flyes
instructions: Grab two dumbbells and lie on an incline bench (chest facing the ceiling) that is set to an incline angle of around 30 degrees.
With a slight bend at the elbows, extend your arms until they are nearly locked out, towards the ceiling.
Rotate your wrists so that your palms are now facing one another. This will be your starting position.
As you inhale, Lower your arms down on a wide arc until you feel a stretch across your chest. Tip: Keep your elbows slightly bent throughout the movement to reduce stress on your joints.

Once you have reached the bottom of the movement, pause for a brief moment before exhaling and returning the dumbbells (along the same path) to their starting position, above your chest. At this point your arms should still be extended and the motion is controlled through your pectoral muscles.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Incline Flyes With A Twist or Pec Deck

es: Coge dos mancuernas y acuéstese en un banco inclinado (con el pecho mirando hacia el techo) que tenga un ángulo de inclinación de aproximadamente 30 grados.
Con una ligera flexión de los codos, extienda los brazos hasta que queden casi bloqueados, hacia el techo.
Gire las muñecas para que las palmas queden ahora una frente a la otra. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras inhala, baje los brazos formando un arco amplio hasta que sienta un estiramiento en el pecho. Consejo: Mantén los codos ligeramente doblados durante todo el movimiento para reducir la tensión en las articulaciones.

Una vez que hayas llegado al final del movimiento, haz una breve pausa antes de exhalar y devolver las mancuernas (por el mismo camino) a su posición inicial, encima de tu pecho. En este punto, tus brazos aún deben estar extendidos y el movimiento debe controlarse a través de los músculos pectorales.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: aperturas inclinadas con giro o plataforma Pec.

name: Dumbbell Goblet Squats
instructions: Grab a dumbbell and hold it by one of it's ends, close to your chest. Adopt a standing position with a shoulder width stance. This will be your starting position.
As you inhale, bend at your knees and waist in order to squat until your thighs become parallel (or just past) to the floor. Tip: Maintain an upright torso throughout the movement.
At the bottom of the movement, pause for a moment, then push through your heels whilst exhaling until you return to a standing position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: If you have any lower back issues, this may not be the most suitable exercise for you. A suggestion would be to try a Leg Press Machine instead.
Variation: Kettlebell Goblet Squat or Wide Stance Leg Press.

es: Coge una mancuerna y sujétala por uno de sus extremos, cerca de tu pecho. Adopte una posición de pie con una postura a la altura de los hombros. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras inhala, doble las rodillas y la cintura para ponerse en cuclillas hasta que los muslos queden paralelos (o justo más allá) del suelo. Consejo: Mantén el torso erguido durante todo el movimiento.
En la parte inferior del movimiento, haz una pausa por un momento, luego empuja con los talones mientras exhalas hasta volver a la posición de pie.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Precaución: si tiene problemas de espalda baja, puede que este no sea el ejercicio más adecuado para ti. Una sugerencia sería probar una máquina de press de piernas.
Variación: sentadilla en copa con pesa rusa o press de piernas en posición amplia.

name: Standing Dumbbell Front Raises
instructions: Pick a couple of dumbbells and stand with a straight torso and the dumbbells on front of your thighs at arms length with the palms of the hand facing your thighs.  This will be your starting position.

While maintaining the torso stationary (no swinging), lift the left dumbbell to the front with a slight bend on the elbow and the palms of the hands always facing down.  Continue to go up until you arm is slightly above parallel to the floor.  Exhale as you execute this portion of the movement and pause for a second at the top. Inhale after the second pause.
Now lower the dumbbell back down slowly to the starting position as you simultaneously lift the right dumbbell.
Continue alternating in this fashion until all of the recommended amount of repetitions have been performed for each arm.
Variations: This exercise can also be performed both arms at the same time.  Also, you could use a barbell as well.

name.es: Elevaciones frontales con mancuernas de pie

en: shoulders
es: hombros

en: Pick a couple of dumbbells and stand with a straight torso and the dumbbells on front of your thighs at arms length with the palms of the hand facing your thighs.  This will be your starting position.

While maintaining the torso stationary (no swinging), lift the left dumbbell to the front with a slight bend on the elbow and the palms of the hands always facing down.  Continue to go up until you arm is slightly above parallel to the floor.  Exhale as you execute this portion of the movement and pause for a second at the top. Inhale after the second pause.
Now lower the dumbbell back down slowly to the starting position as you simultaneously lift the right dumbbell.
Continue alternating in this fashion until all of the recommended amount of repetitions have been performed for each arm.
Variations: This exercise can also be performed both arms at the same time.  Also, you could use a barbell as well.
es: Elija un par de mancuernas y párese con el torso recto y las mancuernas frente a los muslos con los brazos extendidos y las palmas de las manos hacia los muslos.  Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras mantiene el torso inmóvil (sin balancearse), levante la mancuerna izquierda hacia el frente con una ligera flexión del codo y las palmas de las manos siempre hacia abajo.  Continúa subiendo hasta que tu brazo esté ligeramente por encima del paralelo al suelo.  Exhala mientras ejecutas esta parte del movimiento y haz una pausa por un segundo en la parte superior. Inhala después de la segunda pausa.
Ahora baje la mancuerna lentamente hasta la posición inicial mientras levanta simultáneamente la mancuerna derecha.
Continúa alternando de esta manera hasta que se haya realizado toda la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones para cada brazo.
Variaciones: Este ejercicio también se puede realizar con ambos brazos al mismo tiempo.  Además, también puedes usar una barra.

sourceClip.title: How To Do A STANDING DUMBBELL FRONT RAISE | Exercise Demonstration Video and Guide

name: Stiff Leg Dumbbell Deadlifts
instructions: Grab a couple of dumbbells and adopt a standing position with your feet shoulder width apart. Have your arms in front of you but still perpendicular to the floor (palms facing your thighs). Slightly bend at your knees and maintain a straight back throughout. This will be your starting position.

Whilst keeping your knees stationary, inhale as you lean forwards from your waist (remember to keep a straight back), keeping the dumbbells close to you as you go. Keep lowering the dumbbells towards your feet until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings.

After a brief pause bring your torso straight again by pushing your hips forward. Tip: Remember, this whole movement is performed with 'stiff' legs (slight bend at the knee, but no more) and a straight back throughout. Exhale as you perform this part of the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This is not an exercise for those with back issues. Avoid jerking motions as this could cause serious injury.
Variation: Barbell Stiff Legged Deadlift.

name.es: Peso muerto con piernas rígidas con mancuernas

en: Grab a couple of dumbbells and adopt a standing position with your feet shoulder width apart. Have your arms in front of you but still perpendicular to the floor (palms facing your thighs). Slightly bend at your knees and maintain a straight back throughout. This will be your starting position.

Whilst keeping your knees stationary, inhale as you lean forwards from your waist (remember to keep a straight back), keeping the dumbbells close to you as you go. Keep lowering the dumbbells towards your feet until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings.

After a brief pause bring your torso straight again by pushing your hips forward. Tip: Remember, this whole movement is performed with 'stiff' legs (slight bend at the knee, but no more) and a straight back throughout. Exhale as you perform this part of the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This is not an exercise for those with back issues. Avoid jerking motions as this could cause serious injury.
Variation: Barbell Stiff Legged Deadlift.
es: Coge un par de mancuernas y adopta una posición de pie con los pies separados a la altura de los hombros. Mantén los brazos frente a ti pero aún perpendiculares al suelo (con las palmas hacia los muslos). Doble ligeramente las rodillas y mantenga la espalda recta en todo momento. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras mantienes las rodillas quietas, inhala mientras te inclinas hacia adelante desde la cintura (recuerda mantener la espalda recta), manteniendo las mancuernas cerca del cuerpo durante el movimiento. Sigue bajando las mancuernas hacia tus pies hasta que sientas un estiramiento en los isquiosurales.

Después de una breve pausa, vuelva a enderezar el torso empujando las caderas hacia adelante. Consejo: Recuerde, todo este movimiento se realiza con las piernas "rígidas" (ligeramente doblada en la rodilla, pero no más) y la espalda recta en todo momento. Exhala mientras realizas esta parte del movimiento.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Precaución: este no es un ejercicio para personas con problemas de espalda. Evite movimientos bruscos ya que esto podría causar lesiones graves.
Variación: Peso muerto con piernas rígidas con barra.

name: Dumbbell Deadlifts
instructions: Grab two dumbbells and stand with a shoulder width stance, toes pointing slightly outward (palms facing the side of your legs).
Throughout the movement you should keep your head up and maintain a straight back. This will be your starting position.

Descend slowly by bending your knees until your thighs are parallel with the floor. Keep a straight back so that your posture is not compromised. Tip: When at the bottom of the movement your knees should be behind your toes.

Once you have hit the bottom of the movement, pause for a second before pushing your torso back into the starting position through your heels. As you descend inhale and as you ascend, exhale. You should now be at the starting position, ready to go again.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Always be aware of your posture with this exercise as if performed incorrectly, could cause injury.
Variations: Barbell Squats or Smith Machine Squats.

Throughout the movement you should keep your head up and maintain a straight back. This will be your starting position.

Descend slowly by bending your knees until your thighs are parallel with the floor. Keep a straight back so that your posture is not compromised. Tip: When at the bottom of the movement your knees should be behind your toes.

Once you have hit the bottom of the movement, pause for a second before pushing your torso back into the starting position through your heels. As you descend inhale and as you ascend, exhale. You should now be at the starting position, ready to go again.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Always be aware of your posture with this exercise as if performed incorrectly, could cause injury.
Variations: Barbell Squats or Smith Machine Squats.
es: Agarra dos mancuernas y párese con una postura a la altura de los hombros, con los dedos de los pies apuntando ligeramente hacia afuera (con las palmas hacia los costados de las piernas).
Durante todo el movimiento debes mantener la cabeza erguida y mantener la espalda recta. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Desciende lentamente doblando las rodillas hasta que tus muslos queden paralelos al suelo. Mantén la espalda recta para que su postura no se vea comprometida. Consejo: cuando estés en la parte inferior del movimiento, tus rodillas deben estar detrás de los dedos de los pies.

Una vez que hayas llegado al final del movimiento, haz una pausa por un segundo antes de empujar el torso hacia la posición inicial a través de los talones. Al descender, inhala y al ascender, exhala. Ahora deberías estar en la posición inicial, listo para comenzar de nuevo.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Precaución: Esté siempre consciente de su postura al realizar este ejercicio, ya que, si se realiza incorrectamente, podría causar lesiones.
Variaciones: sentadillas con barra o sentadillas con máquina Smith.

name: Dumbbell Shrugs
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and stand with a shoulder width stance. Your arms should be fully extended by your sides, your palms facing each other. This will be your starting position.

As you exhale, lift the dumbbells by lifting your shoulders and squeezing them in towards your ears. Hold this position for a second. Tip: This movement is generated through the lifting motion created from your shoulders. Therefore your arms should remain by your sides throughout and relaxed for the most part.
After this pause, return the dumbbells back to the starting position through the descent of your shoulders.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Shrugs or Smith Machine Shrugs.

en: traps
es: trapecios

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and stand with a shoulder width stance. Your arms should be fully extended by your sides, your palms facing each other. This will be your starting position.

As you exhale, lift the dumbbells by lifting your shoulders and squeezing them in towards your ears. Hold this position for a second. Tip: This movement is generated through the lifting motion created from your shoulders. Therefore your arms should remain by your sides throughout and relaxed for the most part.
After this pause, return the dumbbells back to the starting position through the descent of your shoulders.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Shrugs or Smith Machine Shrugs.
es: Toma una mancuerna en cada mano y párate con una postura a la altura de los hombros. Tus brazos deben estar completamente extendidos a los lados, con las palmas una frente a la otra. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras exhalas, levanta las mancuernas levantando los hombros y apretándolas hacia las orejas. Mantén esta posición por un segundo. Consejo: este movimiento se genera mediante el movimiento de elevación creado desde los hombros. Por lo tanto, tus brazos deben permanecer a los lados y relajados en su mayor parte.
Después de esta pausa, regresa las mancuernas a la posición inicial mediante el descenso de los hombros.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: encogimiento de hombros con barra o encogimiento de hombros con máquina Smith.

name: Standing Dumbbell Shoulder Press
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a shoulder width stance. Without leaning backward or putting your posture into jeopardy, press the dumbbells above your head so that you arms are fully extended, yet slightly flexed/bent at your elbows. Make sure your palms are facing forward at this point. This will be your starting position.

Slowly and in a controlled fashion, descend the dumbbells until they reach the side of your head (parallel with your ears), creating a 90 degree angle at your elbows. Inhale on the downward motion and flare your elbows out wide.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the dumbbells back along this path to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Dumbbell Shoulder Press or Cable Shoulder Press.

name.es: Press de hombros de pie con mancuernas

en: shoulders
es: hombros

en: triceps
es: tríceps

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a shoulder width stance. Without leaning backward or putting your posture into jeopardy, press the dumbbells above your head so that you arms are fully extended, yet slightly flexed/bent at your elbows. Make sure your palms are facing forward at this point. This will be your starting position.

Slowly and in a controlled fashion, descend the dumbbells until they reach the side of your head (parallel with your ears), creating a 90 degree angle at your elbows. Inhale on the downward motion and flare your elbows out wide.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the dumbbells back along this path to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Dumbbell Shoulder Press or Cable Shoulder Press.
es: Coge una mancuerna en cada mano y adopta una postura a la altura de los hombros. Sin inclinarse hacia atrás ni poner en peligro su postura, presione las mancuernas por encima de su cabeza para que sus brazos estén completamente extendidos, pero ligeramente flexionados/doblados a la altura de los codos. Asegúrate de que sus palmas estén mirando hacia adelante en este punto. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Lentamente y de forma controlada, desciende las mancuernas hasta llegar al costado de tu cabeza (paralelo a tus orejas), creando un ángulo de 90 grados en tus codos. Inhale con el movimiento hacia abajo y abra bien los codos.
Después de una breve pausa, exhala y empuja las mancuernas hacia atrás a lo largo de este camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press de hombros sentado con mancuernas o Press de hombros con cable.

name: Single Arm Rows
instructions: Grab two dumbbells and place them next a flat bench. With your right knee, kneel on one end of the bench with your left leg remaining straight and on the floor for support. Lean on the bench with your right hand whilst taking hold of the dumbbell with your left hand. Your torso at this point should be parallel with the floor with a neutral spine. This will be your starting position.

Keeping your upper arm close to your body, pull the dumbbell up to the side of your hip whilst maintaining a stationary torso. Exhale as you lift the dumbbell. Tip: Contract your back muscles in order to create this movement. Your arms should remain as passive as possible.
Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Inhale as you perform this step.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions and then switch sides.
Variations: Seated Cable Row or Alternating Kettlebell Row.
